-paint%3A%20%3B--tw-contain-style%3A%20%7D%3A%3Abackdrop%7B--tw-border-spacing-x%3A0%3B--tw-border-spacing-y%3A0%3B--tw-translate-x%3A0%3B--tw-translate-y%3A0%3B--tw-rotate%3A0%3B--tw-skew-x%3A0%3B--tw-skew-y%3A0%3B--tw-scale-x%3A1%3B--tw-scale-y%3A1%3B--tw-pan-x%3A%20%3B--tw-pan-y%3A%20%3B--tw-pinch-zoom%3A%20%3B--tw-scroll-snap-strictness%3Aproximity%3B--tw-gradient-from-position%3A%20%3B--tw-gradient-via-position%3A%20%3B--tw-gradient-to-position%3A%20%3B--tw-ordinal%3A%20%3B--tw-slashed-zero%3A%20%3B--tw-numeric-figure%3A%20%3B--tw-numeric-spacing%3A%20%3B--tw-numeric-fraction%3A%20%3B--tw-ring-inset%3A%20%3B--tw-ring-offset-width%3A0px%3B--tw-ring-offset-color%3A%23fff%3B--tw-ring-color%3Argb(59%20130%20246%20%2F%200.5)%3B--tw-ring-offset-shadow%3A0%200%20%230000%3B--tw-ring-shadow%3A0%200%20%230000%3B%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unauthenticated%20Access%20to%20Admin%20Panel%20and%20Admin%20APIs%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20endpoint%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F%7Bid%7D%2Fbalance%20accepts%20balance%20update%20requests%20from%20the%20authenticated%20admin%20browser%20session.%20In%20Step%2053%2C%20the%20balance%20of%20account%20%2338%20(Noah%20Campbell's%20Personal%20Loan)%20was%20successfully%20changed%20to%20%24999%2C999.00%20via%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F38%2Fbalance%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A999999%7D%2C%20returning%20HTTP%20200.%20This%20was%20performed%20through%20the%20admin%20panel%20which%20itself%20is%20accessible%20without%20authentication%20(see%20related%20finding)%2C%20meaning%20the%20balance%20modification%20capability%20is%20transitively%20unauthenticated.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20arbitrarily%20set%20any%20customer's%20account%20balance%20to%20any%20value%2C%20enabling%20financial%20fraud%2C%20data%20corruption%2C%20and%20complete%20loss%20of%20data%20integrity%20across%20all%20bank%20accounts.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed.%20The%20probe%20directly%20modified%20a%20live%20account%20balance%20and%20the%20API%20returned%20a%20success%20response%20with%20the%20updated%20balance%20value%20of%20999999.00.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22In%20addition%20to%20fixing%20the%20authentication%20bypass%20on%20the%20admin%20panel%2C%20ensure%20the%20balance%20update%20endpoint%20enforces%20strict%20server-side%20authorization.%20Implement%20audit%20logging%20for%20all%20balance%20modifications.%20Consider%20requiring%20a%20secondary%20confirmation%20or%20approval%20workflow%20for%20balance%20changes.%20Validate%20that%20balance%20values%20fall%20within%20acceptable%20business%20logic%20ranges.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%2053%3A%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Faccounts%2F38%2Fbalance%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A999999%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20200%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B...%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22999999.00%5C%22...%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Balance%20updated%20successfully%5C%22%7D.%20The%20UI%20confirmed%20'Balance%20updated!'%20and%20displayed%20%24999%2C999.00%20for%20Noah%20Campbell's%20Personal%20Loan.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A04%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unrestricted%20Loan%20Account%20Drawdown%20via%20Transfer%20Endpoints%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20endpoint%20accepts%20a%20loan%20account%20creation%20request%20with%20an%20arbitrary%20%60borrow_amount%60%20value%20(e.g.%2C%209999999)%20without%20any%20server-side%20limit%2C%20approval%20workflow%2C%20or%20validation.%20The%20loan%20was%20immediately%20created%20and%20the%20full%20proceeds%20(%249%2C999%2C999.00)%20were%20disbursed%20to%20the%20specified%20account%20in%20a%20single%20automated%20transaction.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20user%20can%20create%20loans%20of%20unlimited%20size%20and%20have%20the%20proceeds%20instantly%20credited%20to%20any%20of%20their%20accounts%2C%20effectively%20generating%20unlimited%20funds.%20This%20is%20a%20critical%20business%20logic%20flaw%20that%20could%20be%20used%20to%20drain%20the%20bank%20or%20launder%20arbitrary%20amounts.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Highly%20likely%20%E2%80%94%20the%20exploit%20requires%20only%20a%20single%20authenticated%20API%20call%20with%20a%20crafted%20%60borrow_amount%60%20field.%20No%20additional%20approval%2C%20credit%20check%2C%20or%20TOTP%20is%20required.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20maximum%20loan%20limits%2C%20require%20multi-step%20approval%20workflows%20for%20loan%20origination%2C%20validate%20%60borrow_amount%60%20against%20configurable%20policy%20limits%2C%20and%20require%20TOTP%20or%20out-of-band%20authorisation%20before%20disbursing%20loan%20proceeds.%20Loan%20creation%20should%20never%20auto-disburse%20without%20human%20or%20risk-engine%20approval.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22borrow_amount%5C%22%3A%209999999%2C%20...%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22-9999999.00%5C%22%2C...%7D.%20Subsequent%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F1%20confirmed%20a%20credit%20transaction%20of%20%249%2C999%2C999.00%20was%20immediately%20posted%20to%20account%2010000001%2C%20raising%20its%20balance%20to%20%2410%2C002%2C948.75.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Account%20Takeover%20via%20Unverified%20Email%20Change%20on%20Profile%20Update%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20endpoint%20at%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20permits%20authenticated%20users%20to%20change%20their%20account%20email%20address%20without%20any%20secondary%20verification.%20The%20application%20accepts%20the%20new%20email%20immediately%2C%20requires%20no%20current-password%20confirmation%2C%20no%20re-authentication%2C%20and%20sends%20no%20confirmation%20link%20to%20the%20original%20address.%20Because%20the%20login%20email%20is%20the%20sole%20account%20identifier%2C%20a%20single%20unapproved%20change%20is%20sufficient%20to%20permanently%20lock%20the%20legitimate%20owner%20out%20of%20their%20account.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20a%20valid%20session%20token%20%E2%80%94%20through%20credential%20stuffing%2C%20session%20hijacking%2C%20or%20exploitation%20of%20the%20observed%20universal%20default%20password%20%E2%80%94%20can%20replace%20the%20victim's%20email%20address%20with%20an%20attacker-controlled%20address%20in%20a%20single%20API%20call.%20The%20legitimate%20owner%20loses%20all%20access%20immediately%2C%20while%20the%20attacker%20gains%20full%2C%20persistent%20control%20of%20the%20account%20using%20the%20new%20email.%20Testing%20confirmed%20this%20against%20user%20ID%201%20(Amelia%20Chen)%3A%20after%20the%20email%20was%20changed%20to%20attacker%40evil.com%2C%20the%20original%20address%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20could%20no%20longer%20authenticate%2C%20and%20the%20attacker-controlled%20address%20returned%20a%20valid%20JWT.%20Given%20that%20all%2015%20customer%20accounts%20share%20the%20weak%20default%20password%20%5C%22password%5C%22%2C%20the%20entire%20customer%20base%20is%20exposed%20to%20this%20attack%20path.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20endpoint%20requires%20only%20a%20bearer%20token%2C%20which%20can%20be%20obtained%20trivially%20given%20the%20weak%20universal%20password%20documented%20elsewhere.%20No%20additional%20user%20interaction%20or%20elevated%20privilege%20is%20needed.%20The%20attack%20is%20fully%20automatable%20and%20leaves%20the%20victim%20with%20no%20self-service%20recovery%20path%20once%20their%20email%20is%20changed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Require%20the%20user's%20current%20password%20to%20be%20supplied%20and%20validated%20before%20any%20email%20address%20change%20is%20accepted.%202.%20Implement%20a%20two-step%20confirmation%20flow%3A%20send%20a%20verification%20link%20to%20the%20new%20address%20and%20a%20notification%20(with%20a%20cancellation%20or%20reversal%20link)%20to%20the%20existing%20address%3B%20do%20not%20commit%20the%20change%20until%20the%20new%20address%20is%20confirmed.%203.%20Rate-limit%20and%20alert%20on%20email%20change%20events%2C%20flagging%20multiple%20changes%20in%20a%20short%20window.%204.%20As%20a%20defence-in-depth%20measure%2C%20enforce%20strong%20password%20requirements%20to%20reduce%20the%20risk%20of%20session%20compromise%20that%20enables%20this%20attack.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20PUT%20request%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20was%20issued%20with%20a%20valid%20bearer%20token%20for%20user%20ID%201%20(Amelia%20Chen)%2C%20supplying%20the%20body%20%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22attacker%40evil.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Attacker%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Test%5C%22%2C...%7D.%20The%20server%20responded%20HTTP%20200%20with%20the%20updated%20email%20reflected%20in%20the%20response%20body.%20A%20subsequent%20POST%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20with%20credentials%20%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22attacker%40evil.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22password%5C%22%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20a%20valid%20JWT%20for%20user%20ID%201.%20Attempting%20to%20log%20in%20with%20the%20original%20address%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20failed%2C%20confirming%20the%20legitimate%20owner%20was%20locked%20out.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser1_token%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22attacker%40evil.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Attacker%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Test%5C%22%2C...%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20200%3A%20%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22attacker%40evil.com%5C%22%2C...%7D%5C%5CnThen%3A%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22attacker%40evil.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22password%5C%22%7D%20%E2%86%92%20HTTP%20200%20with%20valid%20JWT%20for%20user%20ID%201%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Default%20Admin%20Credentials%20Enable%20Full%20Administrative%20Compromise%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20administrative%20authentication%20endpoint%20at%20%60%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%60%20accepts%20the%20trivially%20guessable%20credentials%20%60admin%60%20%2F%20%60admin123%60.%20No%20account%20lockout%2C%20rate%20limiting%2C%20or%20multi-factor%20authentication%20was%20observed.%20Successful%20login%20returns%20a%20signed%20JWT%20granting%20full%20administrative%20privileges%2C%20including%20access%20to%20sensitive%20customer%20data%20via%20%60%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%60.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20unauthenticated%20remote%20attacker%20can%20immediately%20authenticate%20as%20the%20platform%20administrator%20without%20any%20prior%20knowledge%20or%20brute-force%20effort.%20The%20resulting%20JWT%20provides%20full%20administrative%20access%2C%20enabling%20enumeration%20of%20all%2015%20customer%20accounts%20(names%2C%20email%20addresses%2C%20phone%20numbers%2C%20and%20physical%20addresses)%20and%20the%20ability%20to%20perform%20arbitrary%20admin-level%20operations%20on%20the%20banking%20platform.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Critical.%20The%20credentials%20are%20trivially%20guessable%2C%20the%20endpoint%20is%20network-accessible%20with%20no%20observed%20lockout%20or%20MFA%20controls%2C%20and%20exploitation%20requires%20only%20a%20single%20HTTP%20request.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Immediately%20rotate%20the%20admin%20account%20password%20to%20a%20long%2C%20randomly%20generated%20credential%20(minimum%2020%20characters).%202.%20Enforce%20multi-factor%20authentication%20(MFA)%20for%20all%20administrative%20accounts.%203.%20Restrict%20access%20to%20the%20admin%20authentication%20endpoint%20to%20internal%20or%20VPN-sourced%20IP%20addresses%20via%20network-layer%20controls.%204.%20Implement%20account%20lockout%20or%20adaptive%20rate%20limiting%20on%20authentication%20endpoints%20to%20prevent%20credential%20guessing%20attacks.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20request%20to%20%60%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%60%20with%20the%20body%20%60%7B%5C%22username%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin123%5C%22%7D%60%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20issued%20a%20valid%20admin%20JWT%20(%60eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...%60)%2C%20confirming%20successful%20authentication%20with%20default%20credentials.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22username%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin123%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20200%20OK%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22admin%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22username%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22token%5C%22%3A%5C%22eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...%5C%22%7D%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Default%20Weak%20Credentials%20Grant%20Full%20Administrative%20Access%20via%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20administrative%20login%20endpoint%20at%20%60http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%60%20accepts%20the%20trivially%20guessable%20credentials%20%60admin%60%20%2F%20%60admin123%60.%20No%20account%20lockout%20or%20rate-limiting%20was%20observed.%20Successful%20authentication%20returns%20a%20signed%20JWT%20granting%20unrestricted%20access%20to%20all%20administrative%20API%20functionality.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20unauthenticated%20remote%20attacker%20can%20immediately%20obtain%20a%20valid%20administrative%20JWT%20token%20and%20gain%20full%20control%20of%20the%20application%20backend.%20Confirmed%20capabilities%20include%3A%20enumeration%20of%20all%2015%20customer%20records%20(names%2C%20emails%2C%20phone%20numbers)%2C%20viewing%20and%20modifying%20account%20balances%2C%20resetting%20customer%20passwords%2C%20deleting%20customer%20accounts%2C%20manipulating%20foreign%20exchange%20rates%2C%20and%20triggering%20a%20full%20database%20reset.%20This%20constitutes%20complete%20application%20and%20data%20compromise.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Exploitation%20requires%20no%20special%20tools%2C%20knowledge%2C%20or%20privileges%20%E2%80%94%20only%20an%20HTTP%20client%20and%20knowledge%20of%20the%20endpoint.%20The%20credentials%20are%20a%20well-known%20default%20combination%20that%20would%20appear%20in%20any%20credential%20stuffing%20or%20brute-force%20wordlist.%20The%20absence%20of%20observed%20lockout%20controls%20means%20automated%20or%20manual%20attempts%20face%20no%20meaningful%20barrier.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Immediately%20rotate%20the%20admin%20account%20password%20to%20a%20long%2C%20randomly%20generated%20credential%20stored%20in%20a%20secrets%20manager.%202.%20Enforce%20a%20strong%20password%20policy%20for%20all%20administrative%20accounts.%203.%20Implement%20account%20lockout%20or%20exponential%20back-off%20after%20a%20small%20number%20of%20consecutive%20failed%20login%20attempts%20(e.g.%2C%205).%204.%20Require%20multi-factor%20authentication%20(MFA)%20for%20all%20admin%20panel%20access.%205.%20Restrict%20access%20to%20the%20admin%20API%20to%20trusted%20IP%20ranges%20or%20a%20VPN%20where%20operationally%20feasible.%206.%20Audit%20all%20administrative%20actions%20taken%20since%20deployment%20to%20identify%20any%20prior%20unauthorised%20access.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20request%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%20with%20the%20body%20%7B%5C%22username%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin123%5C%22%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20a%20valid%20signed%20JWT%20(HS256)%20along%20with%20the%20message%20%5C%22Login%20successful%5C%22%2C%20confirming%20successful%20authentication%20with%20default%20credentials.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22username%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin123%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20200%20OK%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22admin%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22username%5C%22%3A%5C%22admin%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22token%5C%22%3A%5C%22%5BREDACTED_JWT%5D%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Login%20successful%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22TOTP%20Bypass%20on%20External%20Transfers%20via%20Direct%20API%20Call%20to%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20endpoint%20does%20not%20enforce%20the%20TOTP%20second-factor%20requirement%20that%20the%20advisory%20endpoint%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fcheck%20correctly%20signals%20as%20mandatory%20(requires_totp%3A%20true%2C%20reason%3A%20%5C%22manual_entry%5C%22).%20Because%20the%20TOTP%20check%20is%20implemented%20only%20in%20the%20pre-flight%20%2Fcheck%20endpoint%20and%20not%20within%20the%20transfer%20execution%20handler%20itself%2C%20an%20authenticated%20user%20can%20submit%20a%20transfer%20request%20directly%20to%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20without%20supplying%20a%20totp_code.%20The%20server%20processes%20the%20request%2C%20completes%20the%20transfer%2C%20and%20returns%20totp_verified%3A%20false%20in%20the%20response%20body%2C%20confirming%20that%20no%20TOTP%20validation%20was%20performed%20at%20execution%20time.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20initiate%20outbound%20transfers%20to%20arbitrary%20external%20accounts%20without%20completing%20the%20mandatory%20TOTP%20second-factor%20verification.%20This%20entirely%20negates%20the%202FA%20control%20protecting%20outbound%20funds%20movement%2C%20allowing%20an%20attacker%20who%20has%20obtained%20a%20valid%20session%20token%20%E2%80%94%20through%20credential%20theft%2C%20session%20hijacking%2C%20or%20other%20means%20%E2%80%94%20to%20drain%20account%20balances%20without%20the%20account%20holder's%20knowledge%20or%20consent.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20Exploitation%20requires%20only%20a%20valid%20bearer%20token%20and%20a%20direct%20POST%20request%20to%20the%20execution%20endpoint.%20No%20brute-force%2C%20race%20condition%2C%20or%20elevated%20privilege%20is%20needed.%20The%20bypass%20was%20confirmed%20with%20a%20live%20transaction%20(%241%20deducted%2C%20transaction%20ID%2036%20created%20with%20status%3A%20completed).%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20TOTP%20verification%20server-side%20within%20the%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20request%20handler.%20The%20check%20must%20not%20be%20delegated%20to%20the%20client%20calling%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fcheck%20first.%20Specifically%3A%20(1)%20if%20the%20authenticated%20user%20has%20TOTP%20configured%2C%20reject%20any%20external%20transfer%20request%20that%20does%20not%20include%20a%20valid%20totp_code%20with%20an%20appropriate%204xx%20error%20before%20any%20funds%20movement%20occurs%3B%20(2)%20if%20TOTP%20is%20not%20yet%20configured%20for%20the%20account%2C%20block%20external%20transfers%20entirely%20or%20require%20an%20alternative%20strong%20verification%20step%20until%202FA%20is%20enrolled%3B%20(3)%20treat%20the%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fcheck%20endpoint%20as%20informational%20only%20and%20never%20as%20a%20security%20gate.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20to%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fcheck%20returned%20%7B%5C%22requires_totp%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22reason%5C%22%3A%5C%22manual_entry%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_configured%5C%22%3Afalse%7D%2C%20confirming%20the%20application%20considers%20TOTP%20mandatory%20for%20manual%20external%20transfers.%20A%20subsequent%20POST%20to%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20without%20any%20totp_code%20was%20accepted%20and%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20with%20%7B%5C%22transaction_id%5C%22%3A36%2C%5C%22totp_verified%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22new_from_balance%5C%22%3A%5C%223449.75%5C%22%2C%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22completed%5C%22%7D%2C%20demonstrating%20that%20a%20real%20%241%20transfer%20completed%20successfully%20with%20no%20TOTP%20validation%20performed.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser1_token%5D%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22totp%20bypass%20test%5C%22%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2220000001%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-002%5C%22%2C%5C%22transfer_type%5C%22%3A%5C%22manual%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22transaction_id%5C%22%3A36%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-002%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2220000001%5C%22%2C%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A%5C%221%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_verified%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22new_from_balance%5C%22%3A%5C%223449.75%5C%22%2C%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22completed%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Transfer%20completed%20successfully%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A04%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Insecure%20Design%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unauthenticated%20Loan%20Self-Approval%20Allows%20Customers%20to%20Instantly%20Credit%20Arbitrary%20Funds%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20endpoint%20permits%20any%20authenticated%20customer%20to%20open%20a%20loan%20account%20with%20a%20caller-supplied%20borrow_amount%20and%20a%20caller-supplied%20disbursement_account_id%2C%20with%20no%20server-side%20approval%20workflow%2C%20credit%20assessment%2C%20borrowing%20limit%2C%20or%20human%20review.%20The%20loan%20is%20created%20and%20the%20full%20requested%20amount%20is%20disbursed%20to%20the%20nominated%20account%20in%20a%20single%20API%20call.%20There%20is%20no%20restriction%20preventing%20a%20customer%20from%20specifying%20an%20arbitrarily%20large%20loan%20value.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20attacker%20can%20instantly%20credit%20any%20amount%20to%20their%20own%20account%20by%20submitting%20a%20single%20authenticated%20API%20request.%20During%20testing%2C%20a%20loan%20of%20AUD%20%241%2C000%2C000%20was%20self-approved%20and%20disbursed%20in%20one%20call%2C%20raising%20account%20ID%204's%20balance%20from%20%247%2C210.50%20to%20%241%2C007%2C711.50%20with%20no%20intervention.%20Because%20disbursement%20is%20immediate%20and%20unconstrained%2C%20the%20practical%20upper%20bound%20on%20fraud%20is%20unlimited.%20When%20chained%20with%20the%20separately%20identified%20external%20transfer%20control%20bypass%2C%20the%20attacker%20can%20subsequently%20move%20the%20fraudulently%20obtained%20funds%20out%20of%20the%20institution%20entirely.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20customer%20can%20exploit%20this%20with%20a%20single%20HTTP%20request%20requiring%20no%20special%20tooling%2C%20elevated%20privilege%2C%20or%20knowledge%20beyond%20a%20valid%20session%20token.%20The%20attack%20is%20trivially%20repeatable%20and%20leaves%20the%20institution%20with%20an%20unsecured%20liability%20on%20its%20books.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Loan%20account%20creation%20must%20be%20restricted%20to%20bank%20staff%20or%20administrative%20roles%3B%20the%20customer-facing%20API%20should%20not%20accept%20account_type%20values%20of%20'loan'.%202.%20Implement%20a%20multi-step%20loan%20origination%20workflow%20that%20includes%20identity%20verification%2C%20credit%20assessment%2C%20and%20explicit%20staff%20approval%20before%20any%20account%20is%20created%20or%20funds%20are%20disbursed.%203.%20Enforce%20server-side%20hard%20limits%20on%20borrow_amount%20tied%20to%20the%20authenticated%20customer's%20credit%20profile%3B%20reject%20or%20queue%20any%20request%20that%20exceeds%20pre-approved%20limits.%204.%20Disbursement%20must%20only%20occur%20after%20the%20loan%20application%20has%20been%20approved%20through%20the%20workflow%20%E2%80%94%20never%20atomically%20at%20account%20creation%20time.%205.%20Log%20and%20alert%20on%20any%20attempt%20to%20create%20a%20loan%20account%20via%20the%20customer%20API%20as%20a%20potential%20abuse%20signal.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A10%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Faccounts%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20request%20to%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20with%20account_type%20'loan'%2C%20borrow_amount%201000000%2C%20and%20disbursement_account_id%204%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A40%2C%5C%22account_type%5C%22%3A%5C%22loan%5C%22%2C%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22-1000000.00%5C%22%7D.%20A%20subsequent%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20confirmed%20that%20account%20ID%204's%20balance%20had%20increased%20from%20%247%2C210.50%20to%20%241%2C007%2C711.50%20%E2%80%94%20a%20gain%20of%20exactly%20%241%2C000%2C000.%20No%20approval%20step%2C%20credit%20check%2C%20or%20amount%20limit%20was%20enforced%20at%20any%20point.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser2_token%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22account_type%5C%22%3A%5C%22loan%5C%22%2C%5C%22account_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Fake%20Loan%5C%22%2C%5C%22borrow_amount%5C%22%3A1000000%2C%5C%22disbursement_account_id%5C%22%3A4%2C%5C%22currency%5C%22%3A%5C%22AUD%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A40%2C%5C%22account_type%5C%22%3A%5C%22loan%5C%22%2C%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22-1000000.00%5C%22%7D%5C%5CnGET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20%E2%86%92%20account%20ID%204%20balance%3A%20%241%2C007%2C711.50%20(was%20%247%2C210.50%2C%20%2B%241%2C000%2C000)%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Universal%20Default%20Password%20'password'%20Across%20All%20Seeded%20Customer%20Accounts%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%2015%20seeded%20customer%20accounts%20on%20the%20application%20at%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20are%20provisioned%20with%20the%20identical%2C%20trivially%20guessable%20password%20'password'.%20The%20shared%20credential%20was%20confirmed%20by%20successfully%20authenticating%20as%20multiple%20distinct%20accounts%20(amelia.chen%40example.com%2C%20wei.zhang%40example.com%2C%20noah.campbell%40example.com)%20using%20this%20single%20password.%20The%20presence%20of%20an%20identical%20bcrypt%20hash%20(%242y%2410%2492IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC%2F.og%2Fat2.uheWG%2Figi)%20across%20all%2015%20accounts%20in%20the%20database%20further%20confirms%20that%20no%20unique%20or%20randomised%20credentials%20were%20assigned%20at%20seeding%20time.%20No%20account%20lockout%20or%20rate-limiting%20mechanism%20was%20observed%20to%20impede%20automated%20credential%20stuffing%20against%20the%20login%20endpoint.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20unauthenticated%20attacker%20who%20knows%20or%20can%20enumerate%20any%20customer%20email%20address%20can%20immediately%20take%20over%20the%20corresponding%20account%20by%20submitting%20the%20single%20password%20'password'.%20Successful%20authentication%20yields%20a%20signed%20JWT%20granting%20full%20access%20to%20that%20customer's%20banking%20profile%2C%20including%20account%20balances%2C%20transaction%20history%2C%20and%20the%20ability%20to%20initiate%20fund%20transfers.%20With%20all%2015%20accounts%20sharing%20the%20same%20credential%2C%20a%20single-pass%20credential%20stuffing%20attempt%20against%20a%20harvested%20email%20list%20would%20compromise%20every%20customer%20account%20in%20the%20application.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Exploitation%20requires%20no%20special%20tooling%2C%20prior%20access%2C%20or%20brute-force%20effort.%20The%20password%20is%20a%20well-known%20default%20that%20appears%20at%20the%20top%20of%20every%20common%20wordlist.%20Any%20attacker%20who%20can%20reach%20the%20login%20endpoint%20and%20obtain%20a%20single%20valid%20email%20address%20can%20achieve%20immediate%20account%20takeover.%20The%20risk%20is%20rated%20high.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Immediately%20rotate%20all%20seeded%20and%20demo%20account%20passwords%20to%20unique%2C%20randomly%20generated%20values%20of%20sufficient%20length%20and%20complexity.%202.%20Enforce%20a%20strong%20password%20policy%20at%20registration%20and%20password-change%20endpoints%20(minimum%20length%2C%20complexity%20requirements%2C%20rejection%20of%20common%20passwords%20via%20a%20deny-list).%203.%20Implement%20account%20lockout%20or%20exponential%20back-off%20after%20a%20configurable%20number%20of%20consecutive%20failed%20login%20attempts%20to%20limit%20credential%20stuffing.%204.%20Consider%20requiring%20users%20to%20change%20any%20system-assigned%20password%20on%20first%20login.%205.%20Audit%20all%20non-customer%20account%20types%20(admin%2C%20staff)%20for%20the%20same%20default%20credential%20pattern.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Three%20separate%20accounts%20were%20authenticated%20using%20the%20password%20'password'.%20For%20example%2C%20a%20POST%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20with%20%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22password%5C%22%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20a%20valid%20JWT.%20The%20same%20result%20was%20observed%20for%20wei.zhang%40example.com%20(id%3A2)%20and%20noah.campbell%40example.com%20(id%3A15).%20All%2015%20accounts%20share%20the%20bcrypt%20hash%20%242y%2410%2492IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC%2F.og%2Fat2.uheWG%2Figi%2C%20confirming%20a%20universal%20default%20credential.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22password%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20200%20OK%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22user%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C...%7D%2C%5C%22token%5C%22%3A%5C%22eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Login%20successful%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Broken%20Access%20Control%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Admin%20API%20Permits%20Silent%2C%20Arbitrary%20Password%20Reset%20for%20Any%20Customer%20Account%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20endpoint%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F%3Aid%2Freset-password%60%20accepts%20a%20JSON%20body%20containing%20a%20%60password%60%20field%20and%20immediately%20applies%20it%20to%20the%20target%20customer%20account.%20No%20password%20complexity%20requirements%20are%20enforced%2C%20no%20confirmation%20step%20is%20required%2C%20and%20no%20notification%20is%20sent%20to%20the%20affected%20customer.%20The%20operation%20leaves%20no%20audit%20trail.%20Because%20the%20application%20was%20also%20found%20to%20ship%20with%20default%20admin%20credentials%20(%60admin%60%20%2F%20%60admin123%60)%2C%20any%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20those%20credentials%20%E2%80%94%20or%20who%20exploits%20the%20separately%20confirmed%20credential%20weakness%20%E2%80%94%20can%20silently%20reset%20the%20password%20of%20any%20customer%20account%20to%20an%20attacker-controlled%20value.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20authenticating%20with%20the%20default%20admin%20credentials%20can%20reset%20the%20password%20of%20any%20customer%20account%20to%20a%20known%20value%20and%20immediately%20log%20in%20as%20that%20customer.%20Once%20authenticated%20as%20the%20customer%2C%20the%20attacker%20can%20view%20account%20balances%20and%20full%20transaction%20history%2C%20initiate%20fund%20transfers%2C%20and%20modify%20personal%20details.%20All%2015%20or%20more%20seeded%20customer%20accounts%20are%20affected.%20Because%20the%20reset%20produces%20no%20email%20notification%20or%20audit%20record%2C%20the%20account%20owner%20has%20no%20mechanism%20to%20detect%20the%20takeover.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20attack%20requires%20only%20network%20access%20and%20the%20default%20admin%20credentials%2C%20which%20are%20confirmed%20to%20be%20active%20on%20this%20target.%20No%20further%20preconditions%2C%20user%20interaction%2C%20or%20brute-force%20effort%20are%20needed.%20The%20endpoint%20responded%20with%20HTTP%20200%20and%20a%20success%20message%20during%20testing%2C%20confirming%20the%20operation%20completes%20reliably.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Immediately%20change%20the%20default%20admin%20credentials%20and%20enforce%20a%20strong%20credential%20policy%20for%20all%20administrative%20accounts.%5Cn2.%20Send%20an%20automated%20email%20notification%20to%20the%20customer%20whenever%20their%20password%20is%20reset%20by%20an%20administrator.%5Cn3.%20Require%20administrators%20to%20supply%20a%20written%20justification%20for%20each%20password%20reset%2C%20and%20record%20the%20action%20%E2%80%94%20including%20the%20acting%20admin%20identity%2C%20timestamp%2C%20and%20justification%20%E2%80%94%20in%20an%20immutable%20audit%20log.%5Cn4.%20Enforce%20password%20complexity%20and%20minimum-length%20requirements%20on%20the%20reset%20endpoint%2C%20consistent%20with%20the%20application's%20standard%20password%20policy.%5Cn5.%20Implement%20a%20dual-approval%20workflow%20for%20sensitive%20administrative%20actions%20such%20as%20password%20resets.%5Cn6.%20Review%20all%20admin%20API%20endpoints%20for%20similar%20missing%20authorization%20and%20notification%20controls.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AH%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%2Freset-password%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22During%20testing%2C%20a%20POST%20request%20was%20issued%20to%20%60%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%2Freset-password%60%20using%20a%20valid%20admin%20JWT%2C%20with%20the%20body%20%60%7B%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22pentest123%5C%22%7D%60.%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20%60%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3Anull%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Password%20reset%20successfully%5C%22%7D%60%2C%20confirming%20that%20the%20password%20for%20customer%201%20(Amelia%20Chen%2C%20amelia.chen%40example.com)%20was%20changed%20immediately%2C%20silently%2C%20and%20without%20any%20complexity%20validation.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%2Freset-password%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnHost%3A%20192.168.3.101%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Badmin_jwt%5D%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22pentest123%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20200%20OK%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3Anull%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Password%20reset%20successfully%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unconfirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22The%20crawl%20did%20not%20record%20a%20user%20that%20could%20access%20this%20page%2C%20so%20there%20is%20no%20access-control%20baseline%20to%20compare%20against.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Broken%20Access%20Control%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22critical%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Missing%20Ownership%20Validation%20on%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20Allows%20Unauthorized%20Transfers%20and%20Arbitrary%20Money%20Creation%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20external%20transfer%20endpoint%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%60%20does%20not%20verify%20that%20the%20%60from_account_id%60%20supplied%20in%20the%20request%20body%20belongs%20to%20the%20authenticated%20user.%20Any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20specify%20an%20arbitrary%20account%20ID%20as%20the%20transfer%20source%2C%20including%20accounts%20owned%20by%20other%20customers.%20In%20addition%20to%20the%20access%20control%20failure%2C%20the%20server-side%20logic%20contains%20a%20financial%20integrity%20defect%3A%20when%20an%20account%20the%20caller%20does%20not%20own%20is%20used%20as%20the%20source%2C%20the%20destination%20account%20is%20credited%20but%20the%20source%20account%20is%20never%20debited%2C%20resulting%20in%20funds%20being%20created%20without%20a%20corresponding%20debit%20entry.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20attacker%20can%20(1)%20initiate%20transfers%20debited%20against%20any%20other%20customer's%20account%20without%20their%20knowledge%20or%20consent%2C%20and%20(2)%20credit%20any%20account%20they%20control%20with%20arbitrary%20amounts%20while%20no%20corresponding%20debit%20is%20applied%20anywhere%2C%20effectively%20generating%20unlimited%20funds.%20Both%20consequences%20are%20independently%20critical%3A%20the%20first%20constitutes%20unauthorized%20access%20to%20and%20manipulation%20of%20other%20users'%20financial%20accounts%3B%20the%20second%20undermines%20the%20fundamental%20integrity%20of%20the%20banking%20ledger.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20Exploitation%20requires%20only%20a%20valid%20session%20token%20and%20knowledge%20of%20another%20user's%20account%20ID.%20Account%20IDs%20appear%20to%20be%20sequential%20integers%2C%20making%20enumeration%20trivial.%20No%20additional%20privileges%2C%20user%20interaction%2C%20or%20complex%20preconditions%20are%20required.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Enforce%20server-side%20ownership%20checks%3A%20before%20processing%20any%20transfer%2C%20verify%20that%20%60from_account_id%60%20is%20associated%20with%20the%20authenticated%20user's%20identity%20(e.g.%2C%20matched%20against%20the%20JWT%20%60sub%60%20claim).%20Reject%20requests%20with%20HTTP%20403%20if%20the%20check%20fails.%5Cn2.%20Implement%20atomic%2C%20double-entry%20bookkeeping%3A%20debit%20and%20credit%20operations%20must%20execute%20within%20a%20single%20database%20transaction%20so%20that%20a%20credit%20can%20never%20be%20applied%20without%20a%20corresponding%20debit.%5Cn3.%20Apply%20the%20same%20ownership%20validation%20to%20all%20account-referencing%20parameters%20across%20every%20financial%20endpoint.%5Cn4.%20Emit%20structured%20audit%20log%20entries%20for%20every%20transfer%20attempt%2C%20including%20the%20authenticated%20user%20identity%2C%20the%20requested%20source%20account%2C%20and%20whether%20the%20ownership%20check%20passed%20or%20failed.%5Cn5.%20Consider%20adding%20server-side%20anomaly%20detection%20to%20flag%20or%20block%20unusual%20transfer%20volumes%20or%20repeated%20cross-account%20access%20attempts.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A9.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22User1%20(amelia.chen%40example.com%2C%20sub%3A1)%20submitted%20a%20transfer%20request%20specifying%20%60from_account_id%3D4%60%2C%20an%20account%20belonging%20to%20User2%20(sub%3A2).%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20and%20reported%20a%20successful%20transfer.%20Post-transfer%20balance%20checks%20confirmed%20that%20User2's%20account%204%20was%20not%20debited%20(balance%20remained%20%247%2C210.50)%20while%20User1's%20account%201%20was%20credited%20%24100%20(balance%20increased%20from%20%243%2C250.75%20to%20%243%2C350.75)%2C%20demonstrating%20both%20the%20IDOR%20and%20the%20money-creation%20defect.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnHost%3A%20192.168.3.101%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser1_jwt%5D%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A100%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22test%5C%22%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A4%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2210000001%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-001%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20201%20Created%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22transaction_id%5C%22%3A38%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A4%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-001%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2210000001%5C%22%2C%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A%5C%22100%5C%22%2C%5C%22new_from_balance%5C%22%3A%5C%227210.50%5C%22%2C%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22completed%5C%22%7D%7D%5C%5Cn%5C%5CnUser2%20account%204%20balance%3A%20%247%2C210.50%20(unchanged)%5C%5CnUser1%20account%201%20balance%3A%20%243%2C350.75%20(increased%20by%20%24100)%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unconfirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22The%20crawl%20did%20not%20record%20a%20user%20that%20could%20access%20this%20page%2C%20so%20there%20is%20no%20access-control%20baseline%20to%20compare%20against.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22No%20Rate%20Limiting%20or%20Brute-Force%20Protection%20on%20Login%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20authentication%20endpoint%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%60%20does%20not%20implement%20any%20rate%20limiting%2C%20progressive%20delay%2C%20account%20lockout%2C%20or%20CAPTCHA%20challenge.%20Six%20consecutive%20failed%20login%20attempts%20against%20the%20account%20%60amelia.chen%40example.com%60%20using%20distinct%20incorrect%20passwords%20each%20returned%20an%20identical%20HTTP%20401%20response%20(%60WRONG_PASSWORD%60)%20within%20a%20consistent%20~110%20ms%20response%20time.%20No%20rate-limiting%20headers%20(%60Retry-After%60%2C%20%60X-RateLimit-*%60)%20were%20present%20in%20any%20response%2C%20and%20no%20lockout%20or%20CAPTCHA%20was%20triggered%20after%20the%20sixth%20attempt.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20unauthenticated%20attacker%20can%20submit%20an%20unlimited%20number%20of%20password%20guesses%20against%20any%20account%20without%20restriction.%20Because%20the%20application%20also%20returns%20distinct%20error%20messages%20for%20valid%20versus%20invalid%20usernames%20(user%20enumeration)%2C%20an%20attacker%20can%20first%20identify%20valid%20accounts%20and%20then%20conduct%20targeted%20brute-force%20or%20credential-stuffing%20attacks.%20The%20risk%20is%20compounded%20by%20the%20observation%20that%20seeded%20accounts%20use%20the%20default%20password%20'password'%2C%20making%20successful%20compromise%20trivial.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20endpoint%20is%20unauthenticated%20and%20network-accessible%2C%20no%20defensive%20controls%20were%20observed%20across%20six%20tested%20attempts%2C%20and%20the%20weak%20default%20passwords%20in%20use%20mean%20a%20minimal%20wordlist%20would%20succeed%20immediately.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Enforce%20per-account%20rate%20limiting%3A%20lock%20out%20or%20challenge%20after%20no%20more%20than%205%20failed%20attempts%20within%20a%2015-minute%20window.%202.%20Introduce%20progressive%20server-side%20delays%20(e.g.%2C%20exponential%20back-off)%20after%20repeated%20failures%20to%20slow%20automated%20attacks.%203.%20Implement%20account%20lockout%20after%2010%20cumulative%20failed%20attempts%2C%20with%20self-service%20unlock%20via%20a%20verified%20email%20link.%204.%20Present%20a%20CAPTCHA%20challenge%20after%203%20consecutive%20failures%20from%20the%20same%20client.%205.%20Apply%20IP-based%20rate%20limiting%20as%20a%20supplementary%20control.%206.%20Require%20all%20accounts%20to%20use%20strong%2C%20unique%20passwords%20and%20enforce%20a%20minimum%20password%20complexity%20policy.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Six%20consecutive%20failed%20login%20attempts%20against%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20(passwords%20wrongpassword1%E2%80%93wrongpassword6)%20each%20returned%20HTTP%20401%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22error%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22WRONG_PASSWORD%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Incorrect%20password.%5C%22%7D%7D%20and%20a%20consistent%20~110%20ms%20response%20time.%20No%20Retry-After%20or%20X-RateLimit-*%20headers%20appeared%20in%20any%20response.%20No%20lockout%2C%20delay%20increase%2C%20or%20CAPTCHA%20was%20triggered%20after%20six%20attempts.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22wrongpassword6%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20401%20Unauthorized%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22error%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22WRONG_PASSWORD%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Incorrect%20password.%5C%22%7D%7D%20(same%20response%20for%20all%206%20attempts%2C%20no%20throttling)%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Adversarial%20validator%20exhausted%20the%20step%20budget%20without%20finding%20a%20disproof.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22SQL%20Injection%20in%20Admin%20Customer%20Search%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20%60search%60%20parameter%20of%20the%20admin%20customer%20search%20API%20(%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3D%60)%20is%20interpolated%20directly%20into%20a%20MySQL%20%60LIKE%60%20query%20without%20sanitization%20or%20parameterization.%20The%20vulnerable%20code%20is%20located%20in%20%60%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2FControllers%2FAdminUserController.php%60%20at%20line%2028%2C%20where%20%60PDO-%3Equery()%60%20is%20used%20instead%20of%20a%20prepared%20statement.%20An%20attacker%20can%20break%20out%20of%20the%20%60LIKE%60%20pattern%20context%20with%20a%20single%20quote%20and%20inject%20arbitrary%20SQL.%20Three%20independent%20injection%20techniques%20were%20confirmed%20during%20testing%3A%20error-based%20extraction%20via%20%60extractvalue()%60%2C%20boolean-blind%20injection%20via%20%60OR%201%3D1%60%2C%20and%20time-based%20blind%20injection%20via%20%60SLEEP(3)%60.%20Error-based%20payloads%20successfully%20extracted%20the%20MySQL%20server%20version%20(%608.0.45-0ubuntu0.24.04.1%60)%20and%20the%20active%20database%20name%20(%60bankofed%60)%20directly%20from%20verbose%20error%20responses%20returned%20to%20the%20client.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20attacker%20with%20admin-level%20access%20can%20extract%20arbitrary%20data%20from%20the%20%60bankofed%60%20MySQL%20database%2C%20including%20customer%20PII%2C%20account%20balances%2C%20credentials%2C%20and%20transaction%20history%2C%20using%20error-based%20or%20blind%20injection%20techniques.%20The%20attacker%20can%20also%20enumerate%20all%20schemas%2C%20tables%2C%20and%20columns%20via%20%60information_schema%60.%20If%20the%20MySQL%20user%20has%20the%20%60FILE%60%20privilege%2C%20server-side%20file%20reads%20via%20%60LOAD_FILE()%60%20and%20file%20writes%20via%20%60INTO%20OUTFILE%60%20are%20additionally%20possible.%20Full%20database%20compromise%20is%20achievable%20without%20further%20exploitation%20steps%20beyond%20the%20confirmed%20injection.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20admin%20session%20is%20required%20to%20reach%20this%20endpoint%2C%20which%20limits%20the%20exposed%20attack%20surface.%20However%2C%20the%20injection%20is%20trivially%20exploitable%20with%20no%20additional%20preconditions%20once%20access%20is%20obtained%20%E2%80%94%20no%20blind%20guessing%20is%20required%2C%20as%20error%20messages%20directly%20return%20extracted%20data.%20The%20likelihood%20is%20rated%20medium%20to%20reflect%20the%20authentication%20prerequisite%20against%20an%20otherwise%20straightforward%2C%20high-reliability%20exploit.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20**Replace%20%60PDO-%3Equery()%60%20with%20prepared%20statements**%20throughout%20%60AdminUserController.php%60%20and%20the%20broader%20codebase.%20Bind%20user-supplied%20values%20as%20parameters%20rather%20than%20interpolating%20them%20into%20query%20strings.%20Example%3A%5Cnphp%5Cn%24stmt%20%3D%20%24pdo-%3Eprepare(%5C%22SELECT%20*%20FROM%20customers%20WHERE%20first_name%20LIKE%20%3F%20OR%20last_name%20LIKE%20%3F%20OR%20email%20LIKE%20%3F%5C%22)%3B%5Cn%24term%20%3D%20'%25'%20.%20%24search%20.%20'%25'%3B%5Cn%24stmt-%3Eexecute(%5B%24term%2C%20%24term%2C%20%24term%5D)%3B%5Cn%5Cn2.%20**Suppress%20verbose%20database%20error%20messages%20in%20production.**%20Raw%20%60SQLSTATE%60%20and%20PDO%20error%20strings%20must%20never%20be%20returned%20to%20API%20consumers.%20Log%20errors%20server-side%20only%20and%20return%20a%20generic%20error%20response%20to%20the%20client.%5Cn3.%20**Apply%20input%20validation**%20on%20the%20%60search%60%20parameter%2C%20including%20length%20limits%20and%20a%20character%20allowlist%20appropriate%20for%20a%20name%2Femail%20search%20field.%5Cn4.%20**Audit%20all%20other%20endpoints**%20in%20%60AdminUserController.php%60%20and%20the%20full%20application%20codebase%20for%20similar%20raw%20%60PDO-%3Equery()%60%20usage%20with%20user-supplied%20input.%5Cn5.%20**Apply%20the%20principle%20of%20least%20privilege**%20to%20the%20MySQL%20application%20user%20%E2%80%94%20restrict%20permissions%20to%20only%20the%20required%20tables%20and%20explicitly%20deny%20the%20%60FILE%60%20privilege.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3D%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Five%20payloads%20confirmed%20the%20injection%3A%5Cn%5Cn1.%20**Syntax%20error%20(single%20quote)%3A**%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dadmin'%60%20%E2%86%92%20HTTP%20500%20with%20raw%20MySQL%20error%3A%20%60near%20'%25'%20OR%20last_name%20LIKE%20'%25admin'%25'%20OR%20email%20LIKE%20'%25admin'%25'%60%2C%20exposing%20the%20query%20structure.%5Cn%5Cn2.%20**Boolean-blind%3A**%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dx%2525%2527%2BOR%2B1%253D1%2B--%2B-%60%20%E2%86%92%20HTTP%20200%20returning%20all%2015%20customer%20records%20vs.%200%20for%20a%20non-matching%20baseline.%5Cn%5Cn3.%20**Time-based%20blind%3A**%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dx%2525%2527%2BOR%2BSLEEP(3)%2B--%2B-%60%20%E2%86%92%20Request%20timed%20out%2C%20confirming%20server-side%20execution%20of%20injected%20SQL.%5Cn%5Cn4.%20**Error-based%20version%20extraction%3A**%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dx%2525%2527%2BAND%2Bextractvalue(1%2Cconcat(0x7e%2Cversion()))%2B--%2B-%60%20%E2%86%92%20HTTP%20500%3A%20%60XPATH%20syntax%20error%3A%20'~8.0.45-0ubuntu0.24.04.1'%60%5Cn%5Cn5.%20**Error-based%20database%20name%20extraction%3A**%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dx%2525%2527%2BAND%2Bextractvalue(1%2Cconcat(0x7e%2Cdatabase()))%2B--%2B-%60%20%E2%86%92%20HTTP%20500%3A%20%60XPATH%20syntax%20error%3A%20'~bankofed'%60%5Cn%5CnVulnerable%20code%20identified%20at%20%60%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2FControllers%2FAdminUserController.php%60%2C%20line%2028.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dx%2525%2527%2BAND%2Bextractvalue(1%2Cconcat(0x7e%2Cversion()))%2B--%2B-%20%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnHost%3A%20192.168.3.101%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5BREDACTED_BEARER%5D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20500%20Internal%20Server%20Error%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22error%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22INTERNAL_ERROR%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22SQLSTATE%5BHY000%5D%3A%20General%20error%3A%201105%20XPATH%20syntax%20error%3A%20'~8.0.45-0ubuntu0.24.04.1'%5C%22%2C%5C%22details%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22file%5C%22%3A%5C%22%5C%5C%2Fvar%5C%5C%2Fwww%5C%5C%2Fbankofed%5C%5C%2Fsrc%5C%5C%2FControllers%5C%5C%2FAdminUserController.php%5C%22%2C%5C%22line%5C%22%3A28%2C...%7D%7D%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22specialist_agent%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Adversarial%20validator%20exhausted%20the%20step%20budget%20without%20finding%20a%20disproof.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Injection%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Stored%20XSS%20in%20Banking%20Dashboard%20via%20Unsanitised%20Transaction%20Description%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20banking%20dashboard%20client-side%20script%20(%60dashboard.js%60)%20builds%20transaction%20list%20HTML%20by%20concatenating%20raw%2C%20server-returned%20values%20directly%20into%20an%20%60innerHTML%60%20assignment%20without%20any%20HTML%20encoding.%20The%20vulnerable%20code%20pattern%20in%20%60renderTransactions%60%20is%3A%5Cn%5Cn%60html%20%2B%3D%20'%3Cp%20class%3D%5C%22font-medium%20text-slate-900%20truncate%5C%22%3E'%20%2B%20(tx.description%20%7C%7C%20tx.type)%20%2B%20'%3C%2Fp%3E'%3B%60%5Cn%60container.innerHTML%20%3D%20html%3B%60%5Cn%5CnThe%20transfer%20API%20endpoint%20(%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%60)%20accepts%20a%20free-text%20%60description%60%20field%20and%20stores%20it%20verbatim%2C%20returning%20it%20unchanged%20in%20subsequent%20transaction%20listings.%20Because%20no%20sanitisation%20occurs%20on%20either%20the%20server%20side%20(at%20write%20time)%20or%20the%20client%20side%20(at%20render%20time)%2C%20an%20authenticated%20attacker%20can%20submit%20a%20transfer%20with%20a%20malicious%20HTML%20payload%20as%20the%20description.%20That%20payload%20is%20then%20persisted%20in%20the%20database%20and%20injected%20into%20the%20DOM%20of%20every%20user%20whose%20dashboard%20displays%20the%20transaction.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20store%20arbitrary%20JavaScript%20that%20executes%20in%20the%20browser%20of%20any%20victim%20who%20views%20their%20banking%20dashboard.%20Demonstrated%20impact%20includes%20silent%20execution%20of%20attacker-controlled%20script%20in%20the%20victim's%20authenticated%20session.%20Practical%20consequences%20include%20session%20token%20theft%20and%20account%20takeover%2C%20credential%20harvesting%20via%20injected%20forms%2C%20initiation%20of%20unauthorised%20fund%20transfers%20on%20behalf%20of%20the%20victim%2C%20and%20lateral%20spread%20if%20the%20attacker%20targets%20accounts%20that%20receive%20transfers%20from%20the%20compromised%20account.%20Because%20the%20payload%20is%20stored%20server-side%20and%20fires%20automatically%20on%20dashboard%20load%2C%20no%20further%20interaction%20beyond%20normal%20browsing%20is%20required%20from%20the%20victim.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20Exploitation%20requires%20only%20a%20valid%20authenticated%20session%20and%20a%20single%20API%20call.%20The%20payload%20is%20stored%20persistently%20and%20fires%20automatically%20on%20every%20subsequent%20dashboard%20page%20load%20for%20any%20user%20who%20can%20see%20the%20transaction.%20No%20elevated%20privileges%2C%20social%20engineering%20beyond%20normal%20app%20usage%2C%20or%20complex%20preconditions%20are%20needed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20**Escape%20output%20at%20render%20time%3A**%20Replace%20direct%20concatenation%20with%20an%20HTML-escaping%20helper%2C%20e.g.%20%60U.escapeHtml(tx.description%20%7C%7C%20tx.type)%60%2C%20before%20assigning%20to%20%60innerHTML%60.%20Alternatively%2C%20use%20%60textContent%60%20for%20text-only%20fields%2C%20which%20eliminates%20the%20injection%20vector%20entirely.%5Cn2.%20**Sanitise%20input%20server-side%3A**%20Validate%20and%20strip%20HTML%20tags%20from%20transaction%20description%20fields%20at%20the%20API%20layer%20before%20persisting%20them.%5Cn3.%20**Implement%20a%20strict%20Content%20Security%20Policy%20(CSP)%3A**%20Deploy%20a%20CSP%20header%20that%20disallows%20inline%20script%20execution%20(%60script-src%20'self'%60)%20to%20provide%20defence-in-depth%20against%20any%20remaining%20injection%20points.%5Cn4.%20**Audit%20all%20other%20%60innerHTML%60%20assignments**%20in%20the%20front-end%20codebase%20for%20the%20same%20pattern%20and%20apply%20the%20same%20escaping%20fix.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fbanking%2Fjs%2Fpages%2Fdashboard.js%3Fv%3D20260213-2%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20transfer%20was%20submitted%20via%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%60%20with%20the%20description%20field%20set%20to%20%60%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%60.%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20and%20echoed%20the%20unmodified%20payload%20in%20the%20response%20body%20(%60transaction_id%3A%2043%60%2C%20%60status%3A%20completed%60).%20On%20subsequent%20navigation%20to%20%60%2Fbanking%2F%23%2Fdashboard%60%20as%20user%20Amelia%20Chen%2C%20the%20%60%3Cimg%3E%60%20tag%20was%20injected%20into%20the%20DOM%20via%20%60container.innerHTML%60%2C%20causing%20the%20%60onerror%60%20handler%20to%20fire.%20The%20%60dashboard.js%60%20source%20confirms%20the%20vulnerable%20concatenation%3A%20%60html%20%2B%3D%20'%3Cp%20...%3E'%20%2B%20(tx.description%20%7C%7C%20tx.type)%20%2B%20'%3C%2Fp%3E'%60%20followed%20by%20%60container.innerHTML%20%3D%20html%60.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser_jwt%5D%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22to_account_id%5C%22%3A2%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20201%20Created%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22transaction_id%5C%22%3A43%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22completed%5C%22%7D%7D%5C%5Cn%5C%5CnDashboard%20rendered%3A%20%3Cimg%3E%20tag%20inserted%20into%20innerHTML%2C%20onerror%20handler%20fires%20on%20page%20load.%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Adversarial%20validator%20exhausted%20the%20step%20budget%20without%20finding%20a%20disproof.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unauthorized%20role%20access%20to%20admin%20endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22A%20credential%20that%20was%20not%20observed%20with%20access%20to%20this%20admin-looking%20endpoint%20received%20a%20successful%20direct%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Attackers%20may%20be%20able%20to%20access%20protected%20application%20functionality%20or%20sensitive%20operational%20data%20without%20the%20intended%20authentication%20or%20role%20checks.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20by%20deterministic%20auth%20matrix%20request.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20authentication%20and%20authorization%20on%20the%20endpoint.%20Do%20not%20rely%20on%20client-side%20route%20hiding%20or%20UI%20controls.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2Fjs%2Fapp.js%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Actor%20%60sub%3A1%60%20received%20HTTP%20200%20for%20a%20protected o%20admin%20endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22A%20credential%20that%20was%20not%20observed%20with%20access%20to%20this%20admin-looking%20endpoint%20received%20a%20successful%20direct%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Attackers%20may%20be%20able%20to%20access%20protected%20application%20functionality%20or%20sensitive%20operational%20data%20without%20the%20intended%20authentication%20or%20role%20checks.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20by%20deterministic%20auth%20matrix%20request.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20authentication%20and%20authorization%20on%20the%20endpoint.%20Do%20not%20rely%20on%20client-side%20route%20hiding%20or%20UI%20controls.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2Fjs%2Fpages%2Faccounts.js%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Actor%20%60sub%3A1%60%20received%20HTTP%20200%20for%20a%20protected%2Fsensitive%20endpoint.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2Fjs%2Fpages%2Faccounts.js%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnActor%3A%20sub%3A1%5CnAuthorization%3A%20present%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnHTTP%2F1.1%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A48%3A36%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnlast-modified%3A%20Fri%2C%2013%20Feb%202026%2003%3A32%3A17%20GMT%5Cnetag%3A%20%5C%221831-64aac407c9240-gzip%5C%22%5Cnaccept-ranges%3A%20bytes%5Cnvary%3A%20Accept-Encoding%5Cncontent-encoding%3A%20gzip%5Cncontent-length%3A%202037%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20text%2Fjavascript%5Cn%5Cn%2F**%5Cn%20*%20BankOfEd%20Admin%20-%20Accounts%20Page%5Cn%20*%2F%5Cnwindow.BankOfEdAdmin%20%3D%20window.BankOfEdAdmin%20%7C%7C%20%7B%7D%3B%5Cn%5CnBankOfEdAdmin.AccountsPage%20%3D%20(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20'use%20strict'%3B%5Cn%20 n())%20%7B%20navigate('%23%2Flogin')%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20if%20(!route.auth%20%26%26%20BankOfEdAdmin.Api.isLoggedIn()%20%26%26%20hash%20%3D%3D%3D%20'%2Flogin')%20%7B%20navigate('%23%2Fcustomers')%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20var%20params%20%3D%20%7B%7D%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20route.keys.forEach(function%20(key%2C%20idx)%20%7B%20params%5Bkey%5D%20%3D%20match%5Bidx%20%2B%201%5D%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20route.handler(params)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20return%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cn%20%20%20%20navigate(BankOfEdAdmin.Api.isLoggedIn()%20%3F%20'%23%2Fcustomers'%20%3A%20'%23%2Flogin')%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20showPage(pageId%2C%20navKey)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20document.querySelectorAll('%5Bid%5E%3D%5C%22page-%5C%22%5D').forEach(function%20(p)%20%7B%20p.classList.add('hidden')%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20page%20%3D%20document.getElementById('page-'%20%2B%20pageId)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(page)%20%7B%20page.classList.remove('hidden')%3B%20page.classList.add('page-fade-in')%3B%20setTimeout(function%20()%20%7B%20page.classList.remove('page-fade-in')%3B%20%7D%2C%20250)%3B%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20viewAuth%20%3D%20document.getElementById('view-auth')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20appShell%20%3D%20document.getElementById('app-shell')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(pageId%20%3D%3D%3D%20'auth')%20%7B%20viewAuth.classList.remove('hidden')%3B%20appShell.classList.add('hidden')%3B%20%7D%5Cn%20%20%20%20else%20%7B%20viewAuth.classList.add('hidden')%3B%20appShell.classList.remove('hidden')%3B%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(navKey)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(function%20(link)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20link.classList.remove('active%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2Fjs%2Frouter.js%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnActor%3A%20sub%3A1%5CnAuthorization%3A%20present%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%2
