rict'%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20var%20currencyFmt%20%3D%20new%20Intl.NumberFormat('en-AU'%2C%20%7B%20style%3A%20'currency'%2C%20currency%3A%20'AUD'%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20formatCurrency(amount)%20%7B%20return%20currencyFmt.format(Number(amount)%20%7C%7C%200)%3B%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20formatDate(iso)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(!iso)%20return%20'%E2%80%94'%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20return%20new%20Date(iso).toLocaleDateString('en-AU'%2C%20%7B%20day%3A%20'numeric'%2C%20month%3A%20'short'%2C%20year%3A%20'numeric'%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20var%20escMap%20%3D%20%7B%20'%26'%3A%20'%26amp%3B'%2C%20'%3C'%3A%20'%26lt%3B'%2C%20'%3E'%3A%20'%26gt%3B'%2C%20'%5C%22'%3A%20'%26quot%3B'%2C%20%5C%22'%5C%22%3A%20'%26%2339%3B'%20%7D%3B%5Cn%20%20function%20escapeHtml(str)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20return%20String(str%20%7C%7C%20'').replace(%2F%5B%26%3C%3E%5C%22'%5D%2Fg%2C%20function%20(c)%20%7B%20return%20escMap%5Bc%5D%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20toast(message%2C%20type)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20type%20%3D%20type%20%7C%7C%20'info'%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20container%20%3D%20document.getElementById('toast-container')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20colors%20%3D%20%7B%20success%3A%20'bg-green-600'%2C%20error%3A%20'bg-red-600'%2C%20info%3A%20'bg-dark-700'%2C%20warning%3A%20'bg-amber-500'%20%7D%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20el%20%3D%20document.createElement('div')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20el.className%20%3D%20'toast-enter%20flex%20items-center%20gap-3%20px-5%20py-3.5%20rounded-xl%20text-white%20shadow-lg%20text-sm%20max-w-sm%20'%20%2B%20(colors%5Btype%5D%20%7C%7C%20colors.info)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20el.innerHTML%20%3D%20'%3Cspan%3E'%20%2B%20escapeHtml(message)%20%2B%20'%3C%2Fspan%3E'%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20container.appendChild(el)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20setTimeout(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20el.classList.remove('toast-enter')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20el.classList.add('toast-exit')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20el.addEventListener('animationend'%2C%20function%20()%20%7B%20el.remove()%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D%2C%203500)%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20openModal(html)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20overlay%20%3D%20document.getElementById('modal-overlay')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20document.getElementById('modal-content').innerHTML%20%3D%20html%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20overlay.classList.remove('hidden')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20requestAnimationFrame(function%20()%20%7B%20overlay.classList.add('show')%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20overlay.onclick%20%3D%20function%20(e)%20%7B%20if%20(e.target%20%3D%3D%3D%20overlay)%20closeModal()%3B%20%7D%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20document._modalEsc%20%3D%20function%20(e)%20%7B%20if%20(e.key%20%3D%3D%3D%20'Escape')%20closeModal()%3B%20%7D%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20document.addEventListener('keydown'%2C%20document._modalEsc)%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20closeModal()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20overlay%20%3D%20document.getElementById('modal-ov%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22deterministic_probe%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Confirmed%20by%20deterministic%20auth%20matrix%20module.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A04%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Insecure%20Design%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unrestricted%20Admin%20Control%20of%20FX%20Exchange%20Rates%20Enables%20Arbitrary%20Fund%20Creation%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20admin%20API%20endpoints%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%60%20and%20%60PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%2F%3Aid%60%20accept%20arbitrary%20exchange%20rate%20values%20with%20no%20validation%20against%20real-world%20market%20rates%2C%20no%20rate-change%20limits%2C%20and%20no%20secondary%20approval%20requirement.%20An%20authenticated%20admin%20can%20create%20or%20modify%20a%20currency%20with%20any%20%60rate_to_usd%60%20value.%20The%20public%20conversion%20endpoint%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Fconvert%60%20then%20applies%20these%20rates%20directly%20to%20calculate%20currency%20conversions.%20During%20testing%2C%20a%20currency%20(TST)%20was%20created%20with%20%60rate_to_usd%3D0.0001%60%3B%20a%20subsequent%20conversion%20of%20100%20TST%20to%20AUD%20returned%201%2C570%2C000%20AUD%20%E2%80%94%20a%20ratio%20of%2015%2C700%3A1%20%E2%80%94%20confirming%20that%20the%20system%20applies%20manipulated%20rates%20without%20any%20sanity%20checking.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20admin%20credentials%20(trivially%20possible%20given%20the%20separately%20confirmed%20default%20credential%20weakness)%20can%20introduce%20a%20currency%20with%20a%20severely%20distorted%20exchange%20rate.%20Any%20account%20denominated%20in%20that%20currency%20would%20benefit%20from%20the%20inflated%20conversion%20ratio%20when%20transferring%20funds%20to%20a%20normally-valued%20currency%2C%20effectively%20allowing%20unlimited%20fund%20creation.%20The%20financial%20integrity%20of%20the%20entire%20platform%20is%20at%20risk%2C%20as%20a%20single%20rate%20manipulation%20can%20be%20leveraged%20to%20generate%20arbitrarily%20large%20balances.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Medium.%20Exploitation%20requires%20admin-level%20access%3B%20however%2C%20the%20application%20is%20known%20to%20ship%20with%20default%20admin%20credentials%2C%20meaning%20any%20unauthenticated%20attacker%20can%20trivially%20escalate%20to%20admin%20and%20then%20abuse%20this%20control.%20The%20conversion%20endpoint%20is%20straightforward%20to%20invoke%20once%20a%20manipulated%20rate%20is%20in%20place.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Enforce%20server-side%20validation%20on%20submitted%20exchange%20rates%2C%20rejecting%20values%20that%20deviate%20beyond%20a%20configurable%20threshold%20(e.g.%2C%20%C2%B110%25)%20from%20a%20trusted%20reference%20rate%20feed.%5Cn2.%20Implement%20a%20dual-approval%20or%20four-eyes%20workflow%20for%20all%20FX%20rate%20creation%20and%20modification%20operations.%5Cn3.%20Apply%20a%20maximum%20single-update%20change%20limit%20(e.g.%2C%20no%20more%20than%2010%25%20change%20per%20request)%20to%20prevent%20sudden%20extreme%20shifts.%5Cn4.%20Emit%20immutable%20audit%20log%20entries%20for%20every%20FX%20rate%20create%2C%20update%2C%20and%20delete%20operation%2C%20including%20the%20before%20and%20after%20values%20and%20the%20acting%20user%20identity.%5Cn5.%20Alert%20the%20security%20or%20operations%20team%20in%20real%20time%20when%20a%20rate%20change%20exceeds%20a%20defined%20threshold.%5Cn6.%20Rotate%20and%20enforce%20strong%2C%20unique%20admin%20credentials%20immediately%20to%20eliminate%20the%20prerequisite%20access%20vector.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AH%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20test%20currency%20was%20created%20via%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%60%20with%20%60rate_to_usd%3D0.0001%60%2C%20returning%20HTTP%20201%20and%20%60%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A11%2C%5C%22currency_code%5C%22%3A%5C%22TST%5C%22%2C%5C%22rate_to_usd%5C%22%3A%5C%220.00010000%5C%22%7D%60.%20A%20subsequent%20call%20to%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Fconvert%3Ffrom%3DTST%26to%3DAUD%26amount%3D100%60%20returned%20%60%7B%5C%22converted_amount%5C%22%3A%5C%221570000.00%5C%22%2C%5C%22rate%5C%22%3A%5C%2215700.00000000%5C%22%7D%60%2C%20confirming%20that%20100%20TST%20was%20converted%20to%201%2C570%2C000%20AUD%20using%20the%20manipulated%20rate.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Badmin_jwt%5D%5C%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22currency_code%5C%22%3A%5C%22TST%5C%22%2C%5C%22currency_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Test%20Currency%5C%22%2C%5C%22rate_to_usd%5C%22%3A%5C%220.0001%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20201%20Created%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A11%2C%5C%22currency_code%5C%22%3A%5C%22TST%5C%22%2C%5C%22currency_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Test%20Currency%5C%22%2C%5C%22rate_to_usd%5C%22%3A%5C%220.00010000%5C%22%7D%7D%5C%5Cn%5C%5CnGET%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Fconvert%3Ffrom%3DTST%26to%3DAUD%26amount%3D100%20%E2%86%92%20%7B%5C%22converted_amount%5C%22%3A%5C%221570000.00%5C%22%2C%5C%22rate%5C%22%3A%5C%2215700.00000000%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22confirmed%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Adversarial%20validator%20exhausted%20the%20step%20budget%20without%20finding%20a%20disproof.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22API%20Responses%20Leak%20password_hash%20and%20totp_secret%20to%20Authenticated%20Clients%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20endpoint%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Ftotp%2Fsetup%20returns%20the%20raw%20TOTP%20secret%20in%20plaintext%20within%20the%20JSON%20response%20body%3A%20%7B%5C%22secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22FRERYXSM3RFZGP4CJ2KEAQADEMQDNT2NOVSQCD5K2NAKWMSMHJ2NLHSYH3GCOHQKXGDE2JSI3257KB4DP4DHFUW5P6CY5Y67L77QOVA%5C%22%7D.%20The%20secret%20is%20also%20embedded%20in%20the%20provisioning%20URI%20returned%20in%20the%20same%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20this%20response%20is%20intercepted%20(e.g.%2C%20via%20a%20man-in-the-middle%2C%20logging%20infrastructure%2C%20or%20browser%20history)%2C%20an%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20the%20secret%20can%20permanently%20clone%20the%20victim's%20TOTP%20authenticator%20and%20bypass%20MFA%20for%20all%20future%20logins%2C%20including%20high-value%20operations%20such%20as%20manual%20transfers.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22The%20secret%20is%20transmitted%20over%20HTTP%20(not%20HTTPS)%20to%20the%20client.%20Any%20network%20observer%20or%20proxy%20log%20capturing%20this%20response%20gains%20permanent%20MFA%20bypass%20capability.%20The%20risk%20is%20elevated%20because%20the%20application%20uses%20TOTP%20as%20the%20sole%20second%20factor%20for%20sensitive%20transfers.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Serve%20the%20TOTP%20secret%20only%20over%20HTTPS.%20Do%20not%20log%20API%20responses%20containing%20TOTP%20secrets.%20Consider%20displaying%20the%20secret%20only%20once%20and%20not%20storing%20it%20retrievably%20after%20setup%20confirmation.%20Enforce%20HTTPS%20site-wide%20and%20redirect%20all%20HTTP%20traffic.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Ftotp%2Fsetup%20returned%20200%20with%20body%20containing%20plaintext%20secret%3A%20%5C%22secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22FRERYXSM3RFZGP4CJ2KEAQADEMQDNT2NOVSQCD5K2NAKWMSMHJ2NLHSYH3GCOHQKXGDE2JSI3257KB4DP4DHFUW5P6CY5Y67L77QOVA%5C%22%20and%20full%20provisioning_uri%20including%20the%20same%20secret.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecF 0financial%20transaction%20APIs%2C%20is%20served%20over%20unencrypted%20HTTP%20on%20port%2080.%20No%20HTTPS%20redirect%20or%20HSTS%20header%20is%20observed%20in%20any%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22All%20traffic%20including%20session%20tokens%2C%20credentials%2C%20TOTP%20secrets%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20and%20balances%20is%20transmitted%20in%20cleartext%20and%20is%20trivially%20interceptable%20by%20any%20network-adjacent%20attacker.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Any%20attacker%20with%20access%20to%20the%20same%20network%20segment%20(LAN%2C%20Wi-Fi%2C%20or%20upstream%20router)%20can%20passively%20capture%20all%20session%20tokens%20and%20sensitive%20data%20without%20any%20active%20exploitation.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Deploy%20a%20valid%20TLS%20certificate%20and%20serve%20the%20application%20exclusively%20over%20HTTPS.%20Configure%20HTTP-to-HTTPS%20redirects.%20Add%20the%20Strict-Transport-Security%20header%20with%20a%20long%20max-age%20and%20includeSubDomains.%20Ensure%20all%20cookies%20are%20set%20with%20the%20Secure%20flag.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20probe%20requests%20use%20http%3A%2F%2F%20and%20all%20responses%20are%20returned%20over%20HTTP%20with%20no%20Location%20redirect%20to%20HTTPS%20and%20no%20Strict-Transport-Security%20header%20present.%20Server%20header%20confirms%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%20on%20port%2080.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-con 22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Broken%20Function%20Level%20Authorization%3A%20Admin%20Can%20Reset%20Any%20Customer%20Password%20Without%20Re-Authentication%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20admin%20endpoint%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%2Freset-password%20accepts%20an%20arbitrary%20plaintext%20password%20and%20resets%20the%20target%20customer's%20credentials%20without%20requiring%20any%20re-authentication%2C%20confirmation%20token%2C%20or%20current-password%20verification.%20The%20action%20was%20performed%20successfully%20with%20a%20tester-supplied%20password%20('pentest123')%2C%20returning%20HTTP%20200%20and%20'Password%20reset%20successfully'.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20admin%20(or%20attacker%20who%20has%20compromised%20an%20admin%20session)%20can%20silently%20take%20over%20any%20customer%20account%20by%20setting%20a%20known%20password%2C%20then%20logging%20in%20as%20that%20customer%20to%20access%20funds%2C%20personal%20data%2C%20and%20perform%20transactions.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20endpoint%20is%20directly%20reachable%20with%20a%20standard%20authenticated%20admin%20session%20and%20requires%20no%20additional%20factor%20or%20confirmation%20step.%20No%20CSRF%20token%20or%20re-auth%20challenge%20was%20observed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Require%20admin%20re-authentication%20(e.g.%2C%20current%20admin%20password%20or%20MFA%20challenge)%20before%20resetting%20a%20customer%20password.%20Generate%20a%20secure%20reset%20token%20sent%20to%20the%20customer's%20registered%20email%20rather%20than%20accepting%20a%20caller-supplied%20plaintext%20password.%20Log%20and%20alert%20on%20all%20admin-initiated%20password%20resets.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.2%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AH%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%2Freset-password%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22pentest123%5C%22%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20200%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3Anull%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Password%20reset%20successfully%5C%22%7D.%20No%20re-authentication%20or%20token%20challenge%20was%20observed.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%2 A%22The%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20endpoint%20returns%20different%20users'%20account%20data%20depending%20on%20which%20JWT%20is%20presented%2C%20but%20Step%2015%20shows%20that%20a%20single%20authenticated%20session%20received%20account%20IDs%204%20and%205%20(BSB%20062-002%2C%20belonging%20to%20a%20different%20customer)%20rather%20than%20only%20the%20authenticated%20user's%20own%20accounts.%20This%20indicates%20the%20endpoint%20is%20not%20consistently%20scoping%20results%20to%20the%20token%20owner.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20user%20can%20view%20financial%20account%20details%20(balances%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20BSBs)%20belonging%20to%20other%20customers%2C%20constituting%20a%20serious%20breach%20of%20financial%20data%20confidentiality.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20%E2%80%94%20two%20separate%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20responses%20were%20observed%20in%20the%20same%20session%20returning%20different%20customers'%20data%20(IDs%201-3%20in%20Step%2014%2C%20IDs%204-5%20in%20Step%2015).%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Ensure%20all%20data-access%20queries%20are%20strictly%20filtered%20by%20the%20user_id%20extracted%20from%20the%20validated%20JWT.%20Never%20rely%20on%20client-supplied%20identifiers%20for%20ownership%20scoping.%20Add%20integration%20tests%20asserting%20cross-user%20data%20isolation.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%2014%3A%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20returned%20accounts%20id%3D1%2C2%2C3%20(BSB%20062-001%2C%20Amelia%20Chen).%20Step%2015%3A%20same%20endpoint%2Fsession%20returned%20accounts%20id%3D4%2C5%20(BSB%20062-002%2C%20different%20customer%20'Holiday%20Fund').%20Account%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F4%20returned%20404%20for%20the%20same%20user%2C%20confirming%20inconsistent%20ownership%20enforcement.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20endpoint%20accepted%20from_account_id%3D4%2C%20which%20belongs%20to%20a%20different%20customer%20(not%20the%20authenticated%20user%20amelia.chen)%2C%20and%20completed%20the%20transfer%20successfully%20(HTTP%20201)%2C%20debiting%20that%20account%20by%20%24100.%20No%20ownership%20check%20was%20enforced%20on%20the%20source%20account.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20user%20can%20drain%20funds%20from%20any%20account%20in%20the%20system%20by%20supplying%20an%20arbitrary%20from_account_id.%20This%20constitutes%20a%20direct%20financial%20loss%20vulnerability%20affecting%20all%20customers.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20probe%20confirmed%20a%20successful%20transfer%20from%20account%20ID%204%20(not%20owned%20by%20the%20authenticated%20user)%20with%20a%20standard%20authenticated%20API%20call%20and%20no%20additional%20privilege%20required.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20ownership%20validation%20on%20from_account_id%20for%20all%20transfer%20endpoints%2C%20ensuring%20the%20authenticated%20user%20owns%20the%20source%20account.%20Return%20403%20Forbidden%20if%20the%20account%20does%20not%20belong%20to%20the%20requesting%20user.%20Add%20automated%20tests%20covering%20cross-user%20account%20access.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20with%20%7B%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A4%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-001%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2210000001%5C%22%2C%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A100%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22new_from_balance%5C%22%3A%5C%227210.50%5C%22%2C%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22completed%5C%22%7D.%20Account%204%20is%20not%20owned%20by%20the%20authenticated%20user%20(amelia.chen).%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_ver B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Two%20separate%20calls%20to%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20using%20the%20same%20primary%20session%20returned%20different%20users'%20account%20data.%20Step%2087%20returned%20accounts%20for%20BSB%20062-002%20(IDs%204%20and%205%2C%20belonging%20to%20a%20second%20customer)%2C%20while%20Step%2088%20returned%20accounts%20for%20BSB%20062-001%20(IDs%201%E2%80%933).%20The%20endpoint%20does%20not%20consistently%20scope%20results%20to%20the%20authenticated%20user%2C%20leaking%20other%20customers'%20account%20numbers%2C%20balances%2C%20and%20account%20types.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20enumerate%20other%20customers'%20bank%20accounts%2C%20balances%2C%20and%20BSB%2Faccount-number%20combinations%2C%20enabling%20targeted%20fraud%2C%20social%20engineering%2C%20or%20further%20exploitation%20of%20transfer%20endpoints.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20%E2%80%94%20the%20probe%20observed%20two%20distinct%20account%20sets%20returned%20for%20the%20same%20session%20without%20any%20parameter%20change%2C%20indicating%20a%20server-side%20scoping%20failure.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20ownership%20checks%20on%20every%20account%20query.%20The%20authenticated%20user's%20ID%20must%20be%20used%20as%20a%20mandatory%20filter%3B%20never%20rely%20on%20client-supplied%20identifiers%20alone.%20Add%20integration%20tests%20asserting%20that%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20never%20returns%20records%20belonging%20to%20a%20different%20user_id.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%2087%20response%3A%20accounts%20id%3D4%2C5%20(account_numbers%2020000001%2F20000002%2C%20BSB%20062-002).%20Step%2088%20response%20(same%20session)%3A%20accounts%20id%3D1%2C2%2C3%20(account_numbers%2010000001%2F10000002%2F10000003%2C%20BSB%20062-001%2C%20including%20a%20Home%20Loan%20balance%20of%20-285000.00).%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F1%20endpoint%20returned%20full%20account%20details%20and%20transaction%20history%20for%20account%20ID%201%2C%20which%20belongs%20to%20a%20different%20user%20(Amelia%20Chen%20%2F%20primary%20user%2C%20account%2010000001)%2C%20while%20the%20authenticated%20session%20belongs%20to%20Zoe%20Williams%20(accounts%206%2C%207%2C%208).%20The%20API%20does%20not%20enforce%20ownership%20checks%20on%20the%20account%20ID%20path%20parameter.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20enumerate%20and%20read%20the%20account%20balances%2C%20BSB%2C%20account%20numbers%2C%20and%20full%20transaction%20history%20of%20any%20other%20customer%20by%20iterating%20account%20IDs.%20This%20constitutes%20a%20complete%20breach%20of%20financial%20data%20confidentiality.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Highly%20likely%20%E2%80%94%20the%20probe%20accessed%20account%20ID%201%20directly%20while%20authenticated%20as%20Zoe%20Williams%20and%20received%20a%20full%20200%20response%20with%20another%20user's%20data.%20Sequential%20ID%20enumeration%20is%20trivial.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20server-side%20ownership%20checks%20on%20every%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F%7Bid%7D%20request%2C%20ensuring%20the%20authenticated%20user%20owns%20the%20requested%20account.%20Return%20HTTP%20403%20or%20404%20for%20accounts%20not%20belonging%20to%20the%20requesting%20user.%20Apply%20the%20same%20control%20to%20all%20account%20sub-resources%20(transactions%2C%20statements).%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F1%20while%20authenticated%20as%20Zoe%20Williams%20(accounts%206%2C7%2C8)%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20full%20details%20for%20account%2010000001%20(Everyday%20Account%2C%20balance%20%2410%2C002%2C948.75)%20belonging%20to%20another%20user%2C%20including%208%2B%20transaction%20records.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20D %22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Login%20API%20Response%20Leaks%20bcrypt%20Password%20Hash%20and%20TOTP%20Secret%20Field%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20endpoint%20returns%20the%20full%20user%20record%20in%20its%20response%20body%2C%20including%20the%20bcrypt%20password_hash%20and%20the%20plaintext%20TOTP%20secret.%20Any%20authenticated%20user%20who%20updates%20their%20profile%20receives%20these%20sensitive%20fields%20in%20the%20JSON%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20with%20a%20valid%20session%20can%20harvest%20the%20TOTP%20secret%20to%20clone%20the%20second%20factor%2C%20and%20the%20password%20hash%20can%20be%20subjected%20to%20offline%20brute-force%20attacks.%20Combined%2C%20this%20effectively%20bypasses%20MFA%20and%20allows%20full%20account%20takeover.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Highly%20likely%20%E2%80%94%20any%20authenticated%20user%20triggering%20a%20profile%20update%20receives%20the%20secrets%20immediately%20in%20the%20response%20body%20with%20no%20additional%20privilege%20required.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Strip%20sensitive%20fields%20(password_hash%2C%20totp_secret)%20from%20all%20API%20responses.%20Apply%20a%20response%20allowlist%2FDTO%20pattern%20so%20only%20safe%20fields%20(id%2C%20email%2C%20first_name%2C%20last_name%2C%20address%20fields%2C%20phone%2C%20totp_enabled)%20are%20ever%20serialised%20to%20the%20client.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22aff t-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Login%20API%20Response%20Leaks%20bcrypt%20Password%20Hash%20and%20TOTP%20Secret%20Field%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20endpoint%20returns%20the%20user's%20bcrypt%20password%20hash%20and%20plaintext%20TOTP%20secret%20in%20the%20JSON%20response%20body.%20These%20fields%20(password_hash%20and%20totp_secret)%20are%20internal%20server-side%20credentials%20that%20should%20never%20be%20transmitted%20to%20the%20client.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20with%20a%20valid%20session%20token%20can%20retrieve%20the%20bcrypt%20password%20hash%20for%20offline%20cracking%20and%20the%20TOTP%20secret%20to%20generate%20valid%20one-time%20passwords%2C%20fully%20bypassing%20two-factor%20authentication%20and%20potentially%20compromising%20the%20account%20permanently%20even%20after%20a%20password%20reset.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Highly%20likely%20%E2%80%94%20any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20call%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20with%20their%20session%20token%20and%20immediately%20receive%20these%20values.%20No%20additional%20privilege%20escalation%20is%20required.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Remove%20password_hash%20and%20totp_secret%20from%20all%20API%20responses.%20Apply%20an%20allowlist%20of%20fields%20to%20serialize%20in%20the%20profile%20response%20(e.g.%2C%20id%2C%20email%2C%20first_name%2C%20last_name%2C%20phone%2C%20address%20fields%2C%20totp_enabled).%20Audit%20all%20other%20endpoints%20for%20similar%20over-exposure%20of%20internal%20fields.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Response%20body%20included%3A%20%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22%242y%2410%247MXKQTREVt%5C%5C%2FJyKqijABx3...%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22DQLCVUVHZGOIJLKWNVQEO6GSMVVIOKTRQTGKF5CMKOX44KTJTCAYQZEAUZ3XSCQDLV3LYHKQCO7U2RN22APKPEDFRFXLXV2PILVQC6I%5C%22%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*% AiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22No%20Rate%20Limiting%20or%20Brute-Force%20Protection%20on%20Admin%20Login%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Six%20consecutive%20failed%20login%20attempts%20for%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20(steps%2097%2C%2099%2C%20101%2C%20102%2C%20103%2C%20104)%20all%20returned%20HTTP%20401%20with%20the%20same%20WRONG_PASSWORD%20error%20and%20no%20indication%20of%20rate-limiting%2C%20lockout%2C%20CAPTCHA%2C%20or%20increasing%20delay.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20perform%20unlimited%20online%20brute-force%20or%20credential-stuffing%20attacks%20against%20any%20known%20email%20address%20without%20triggering%20any%20defensive%20mechanism.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20%E2%80%94%20six%20rapid%20sequential%20failures%20produced%20identical%20responses%20with%20no%20throttling%20observed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Implement%20account%20lockout%20or%20progressive%20delay%20after%20a%20configurable%20number%20of%20failed%20attempts%20(e.g.%2C%205).%20Add%20rate-limiting%20per%20IP%20and%20per%20account.%20Consider%20CAPTCHA%20after%20repeated%20failures.%20Log%20and%20alert%20on%20brute-force%20patterns.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Steps%2097%E2%80%93104%3A%20six%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20requests%20with%20wrong%20passwords%20all%20returned%20HTTP%20401%20%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22WRONG_PASSWORD%5C%22%7D%20with%20no%20rate-limit%20headers%2C%20no%20lockout%2C%20and%20no%20delay%20increase.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Stored%20XSS%20via%20Profile%20Update%20%E2%80%94%20Unsanitised%20HTML%20Persisted%20in%20Customer%20Name%20Fields%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%20endpoint%20accepts%20unsanitised%20HTML%2FJavaScript%20in%20the%20first_name%20field.%20The%20payload%20%3Cscript%3Ealert('xss')%3C%2Fscript%3E%20was%20stored%20in%20the%20database%20and%20subsequently%20rendered%20in%20the%20admin%20customers%20list%20page%20(Step%20133)%2C%20where%20customer%20%231%20is%20displayed%20as%20'%3Cscript%3Ealert('xss')%3C%2Fscript%3E%20User'.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20can%20submit%20data%20that%20reaches%20the%20admin%20panel%20(e.g.%2C%20via%20a%20customer-facing%20registration%20or%20profile%20update%20flow%20that%20feeds%20into%20admin%20views)%20can%20execute%20arbitrary%20JavaScript%20in%20the%20browser%20of%20any%20admin%20user%20who%20views%20the%20customers%20list%20or%20customer%20detail%20page%2C%20enabling%20session%20hijacking%2C%20credential%20theft%2C%20or%20admin%20account%20takeover.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20%E2%80%94%20the%20payload%20was%20stored%20via%20the%20admin%20API%20and%20rendered%20verbatim%20in%20the%20admin%20customers%20list%20(Step%20133%20visible%20text%20shows%20the%20raw%20script%20tag%20as%20the%20customer%20name).%20Exploitation%20requires%20the%20admin%20panel%20to%20render%20the%20field%20without%20escaping%2C%20which%20is%20evidenced.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Apply%20context-aware%20output%20encoding%20on%20all%20dynamic%20values%20rendered%20into%20HTML%20in%20the%20admin%20frontend.%20Sanitise%20and%20validate%20all%20string%20inputs%20server-side%20(reject%20or%20strip%20HTML%20tags%20in%20name%20fields).%20Implement%20a%20Content-Security-Policy%20header%20on%20the%20admin%20application%20to%20prevent%20inline%20script%20execution%20as%20a%20defence-in-depth%20measure.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%2F1%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cscript%3Ealert('xss')%3C%2Fscript%3E%5C%22%7D%20returned%20200%20with%20the%20payload%20stored.%20Step%20133%20admin%20customers%20list%20rendered%3A%20'%231%20%20%3Cscript%3Ealert(%5C%5C'xss%5C%5C')%3C%2Fscript%3E%20User%20%20amelia.chen%40example.com'.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credential 5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Stored%20XSS%20via%20Profile%20Update%20%E2%80%94%20Unsanitised%20HTML%20Persisted%20in%20Customer%20Name%20Fields%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%20endpoint%20accepts%20arbitrary%20HTML%20in%20the%20description%20field%20without%20sanitisation.%20The%20payload%20%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%20was%20accepted%20and%20stored%20(HTTP%20201)%2C%20and%20the%20raw%20payload%20is%20returned%20in%20the%20API%20response.%20The%20dashboard.js%20source%20code%20(Step%20149)%20renders%20transaction%20descriptions%20using%20innerHTML-based%20HTML%20construction%2C%20indicating%20the%20payload%20will%20execute%20when%20the%20dashboard%20or%20transaction%20history%20is%20rendered.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20store%20an%20XSS%20payload%20in%20a%20transaction%20description.%20When%20the%20victim%20(same%20or%20another%20user%20receiving%20the%20transfer)%20views%20their%20dashboard%20or%20transaction%20history%2C%20the%20script%20executes%20in%20their%20browser%2C%20enabling%20session%20hijacking%20or%20account%20takeover.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Likely%20%E2%80%94%20the%20payload%20was%20accepted%20and%20stored.%20The%20dashboard.js%20rendering%20code%20builds%20HTML%20via%20string%20concatenation%20and%20sets%20innerHTML%2C%20and%20does%20not%20appear%20to%20escape%20transaction%20descriptions%20in%20the%20renderTransactions%20function.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Sanitise%20all%20user-supplied%20text%20fields%20server-side%20before%20storage%2C%20rejecting%20or%20stripping%20HTML%20tags.%20In%20the%20frontend%2C%20use%20textContent%20or%20a%20dedicated%20HTML-escaping%20function%20(like%20the%20existing%20U.escapeHtml)%20when%20rendering%20transaction%20descriptions%20into%20the%20DOM.%20Never%20use%20innerHTML%20with%20unsanitised%20data.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%20with%20description%20%5C%22%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%5C%22%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20with%20the%20raw%20payload%20echoed%20in%20the%20response.%20dashboard.js%20constructs%20transaction%20rows%20via%20innerHTML%20string%20concatenation%20without%20escaping%20the%20description%20field.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%
