h%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Stored%20XSS%20via%20Profile%20Update%20%E2%80%94%20Unsanitised%20HTML%20Persisted%20in%20Customer%20Name%20Fields%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22A%20transaction%20description%20containing%20the%20payload%20%60%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%60%20was%20stored%20in%20the%20database%20and%20is%20returned%20verbatim%20in%20the%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F1%20transaction%20history%20response.%20If%20the%20front-end%20renders%20this%20description%20without%20escaping%2C%20the%20script%20will%20execute%20in%20any%20user's%20browser%20that%20views%20the%20affected%20account%20or%20dashboard.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20store%20malicious%20JavaScript%20that%20executes%20in%20the%20browser%20of%20any%20user%20(including%20bank%20staff%20or%20admins)%20who%20views%20the%20transaction.%20This%20could%20be%20used%20to%20steal%20session%20tokens%2C%20perform%20actions%20on%20behalf%20of%20the%20victim%2C%20or%20exfiltrate%20sensitive%20financial%20data.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Likely%20%E2%80%94%20the%20payload%20is%20confirmed%20stored%20in%20the%20API%20response.%20Exploitation%20depends%20on%20whether%20the%20front-end%20renders%20the%20description%20as%20innerHTML%3B%20the%20accounts.js%20source%20uses%20%60U.escapeHtml()%60%20in%20some%20places%20but%20the%20dashboard%20recent-activity%20rendering%20path%20has%20not%20been%20confirmed%20safe%20for%20all%20contexts.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Ensure%20all%20transaction%20description%20output%20is%20HTML-encoded%20before%20insertion%20into%20the%20DOM.%20Avoid%20%60innerHTML%60%20for%20user-supplied%20content%3B%20use%20%60textContent%60%20instead.%20Implement%20a%20Content%20Security%20Policy%20that%20blocks%20inline%20script%20execution.%20Add%20server-side%20input%20validation%20to%20reject%20or%20sanitise%20HTML%20tags%20in%20description%20fields.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Transaction%20ID%2043%20in%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%2F1%20response%20contains%20description%3A%20%5C%22%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert('XSS-dashboard')%3E%5C%22%20stored%20verbatim%20and%20returned%20in%20JSON.%20The%20payload%20was%20previously%20submitted%20via%20the%20transfer%20endpoint%20and%20persisted%20to%20the%20database.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unauthenticated%20Access%20to%20Admin%20Panel%20and%20Admin%20APIs%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%20endpoint%20accepted%20a%20new%20FX%20rate%20entry%20and%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20without%20requiring%20an%20admin-level%20bearer%20token.%20The%20request%20was%20made%20from%20the%20primary%20(non-admin)%20session%20context%20and%20succeeded%2C%20creating%20currency%20code%20'TST'%20with%20rate_to_usd%3D0.0001.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20(or%20potentially%20unauthenticated)%20user%20can%20create%2C%20and%20potentially%20modify%20or%20delete%2C%20FX%20rates.%20An%20attacker%20could%20set%20an%20extreme%20exchange%20rate%20to%20manipulate%20currency%20conversion%20calculations%20in%20transfers%2C%20enabling%20financial%20fraud%20(e.g.%2C%20sending%201%20unit%20of%20a%20near-zero-rate%20currency%20and%20receiving%20a%20large%20AUD%20equivalent).%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20%E2%80%94%20the%20probe%20successfully%20created%20an%20FX%20rate%20entry%20via%20the%20admin%20API%20endpoint%20using%20a%20regular%20user%20session%2C%20with%20HTTP%20201%20returned.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Enforce%20a%20separate%20admin%20role%20check%20(e.g.%2C%20is_admin%20flag%20validated%20server-side)%20on%20all%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2F*%20routes.%20Regular%20user%20JWTs%20must%20be%20rejected%20with%20403.%20Add%20automated%20tests%20asserting%20non-admin%20tokens%20receive%20403%20on%20all%20admin%20endpoints.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Ffx-rates%20with%20body%20%7B%5C%22currency_code%5C%22%3A%5C%22TST%5C%22%2C%5C%22currency_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Test%20Currency%5C%22%2C%5C%22rate_to_usd%5C%22%3A%5C%220.0001%5C%22%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A11%2C%5C%22currency_code%5C%22%3A%5C%22TST%5C%22%2C...%7D%7D.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Cryptographic%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22API%20Responses%20Leak%20password_hash%20and%20totp_secret%20to%20Authenticated%20Clients%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22Several%20API%20endpoints%20serialize%20and%20return%20sensitive%20security%20credential%20fields%20directly%20to%20the%20client%20in%20their%20JSON%20responses.%20Specifically%2C%20the%20bcrypt%20password%20hash%20(password_hash)%20and%20the%20raw%20TOTP%20seed%20(totp_secret)%20are%20included%20in%20responses%20from%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2C%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2C%20and%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin.%20The%20raw%20TOTP%20secret%20is%20additionally%20returned%20by%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Ftotp%2Fsetup.%20These%20fields%20have%20no%20legitimate%20use%20on%20the%20client%20side%20and%20must%20never%20leave%20the%20server.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20a%20valid%20session%20token%20%E2%80%94%20through%20theft%2C%20XSS%2C%20or%20any%20other%20means%20%E2%80%94%20can%20retrieve%20the%20victim's%20bcrypt%20password%20hash%20and%20submit%20it%20to%20offline%20cracking%20tools%2C%20recovering%20the%20plaintext%20password%20without%20any%20further%20interaction%20with%20the%20server.%20More%20critically%2C%20possession%20of%20the%20raw%20totp_secret%20allows%20the%20attacker%20to%20permanently%20clone%20the%20victim's%20TOTP%20authenticator%3A%20they%20can%20generate%20valid%20one-time%20codes%20at%20any%20future%20point%20in%20time%2C%20completely%20bypassing%20two-factor%20authentication%20on%20logins%20and%20sensitive%20operations%20even%20if%20the%20victim%20subsequently%20changes%20their%20password.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20user%20can%20trigger%20this%20exposure%20with%20a%20standard%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20request.%20No%20elevated%20privileges%2C%20special%20tooling%2C%20or%20race%20conditions%20are%20required.%20The%20fields%20are%20returned%20unconditionally%20in%20the%20normal%20application%20flow%2C%20making%20exploitation%20straightforward%20for%20any%20attacker%20who%20holds%20a%20valid%20bearer%20token.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Strip%20password_hash%20and%20totp_secret%20from%20all%20serialised%20user%20objects%20before%20any%20API%20response%20is%20sent%20to%20the%20client.%20This%20is%20best%20enforced%20at%20the%20serialisation%20layer%20(e.g.%2C%20via%20an%20allowlist%20of%20fields%20permitted%20in%20API%20output)%20rather%20than%20relying%20on%20per-endpoint%20exclusions.%20The%20TOTP%20setup%20endpoint%20(POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Ftotp%2Fsetup)%20should%20return%20only%20the%20provisioning%20URI%20and%20QR%20code%20image%20data%20needed%20for%20initial%20authenticator%20enrollment%3B%20the%20raw%20secret%20must%20not%20be%20included%20in%20the%20response%20body%20after%20setup%20is%20complete.%20Conduct%20a%20full%20audit%20of%20all%20endpoints%20that%20return%20user%20objects%20to%20confirm%20no%20other%20sensitive%20fields%20are%20inadvertently%20exposed.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20request%20with%20a%20valid%20bearer%20token%20returned%20a%20JSON%20body%20containing%20both%20password_hash%20(%5C%22%242y%2410%2492IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC%2F.og%2Fat2.uheWG%2Figi%5C%22)%20and%20totp_secret%20(%5C%22A2SZC3UPM6EUVFNFTZTKNP3EK5PYSXBZBY7SB5UBEPEJUPH5WZ6JC3RS6GYYXOZWYBEMZ46ECS5M6HLZCUEUSDVRGIFCZMIYWD4JVRQ%5C%22).%20The%20same%20fields%20were%20observed%20in%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20and%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20responses.%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%2Ftotp%2Fsetup%20additionally%20returned%20the%20raw%20secret%20alongside%20the%20provisioning%20URI.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Btoken%5D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22%242y%2410%2492IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC%5C%5C%2F.og%5C%5C%2Fat2.uheWG%5C%5C%2Figi%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22A2SZC3UPM6EUVFNFTZTKNP3EK5PYSXBZBY7SB5UBEPEJUPH5WZ6JC3RS6GYYXOZWYBEMZ46ECS5M6HLZCUEUSDVRGIFCZMIYWD4JVRQ%5C%22%2C...%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Security%20Misconfiguration%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Misconfiguration%20%E2%80%94%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflected%20with%20Credentials%20Allowed%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20API%20at%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20(and%20consistently%20across%20all%20API%20endpoints)%20reflects%20the%20caller's%20Origin%20header%20verbatim%20in%20the%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%20response%20header%20while%20simultaneously%20setting%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true.%20When%20a%20request%20was%20sent%20with%20Origin%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fevil.example.com%2C%20the%20server%20responded%20with%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fevil.example.com%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%2C%20and%20returned%20the%20full%20authenticated%20profile%20payload%20%E2%80%94%20including%20the%20password_hash%20and%20totp_secret%20fields%20%E2%80%94%20in%20the%20response%20body.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Because%20the%20server%20reflects%20arbitrary%20origins%20and%20permits%20credentialed%20cross-origin%20requests%2C%20any%20attacker-controlled%20website%20can%20issue%20authenticated%20API%20calls%20on%20behalf%20of%20a%20logged-in%20victim%20using%20the%20victim's%20existing%20session%20token%20or%20cookies%2C%20and%20read%20the%20full%20response%20in%20JavaScript.%20In%20this%20engagement%20the%20response%20body%20was%20confirmed%20to%20contain%20sensitive%20fields%20(password_hash%2C%20totp_secret).%20A%20victim%20who%20visits%20a%20malicious%20page%20while%20authenticated%20to%20the%20banking%20application%20could%20have%20their%20profile%20data%2C%20account%20balances%2C%20and%20transaction%20history%20silently%20exfiltrated.%20The%20severity%20is%20elevated%20above%20the%20default%20CORS%20baseline%20because%20browser-readable%20sensitive%20credential%20material%20(password%20hash%2C%20TOTP%20secret)%20was%20directly%20observed%20in%20the%20cross-origin%20response.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22A%20victim%20must%20be%20authenticated%20to%20the%20banking%20application%20and%20visit%20an%20attacker-controlled%20page%20in%20the%20same%20browser%20session.%20No%20additional%20user%20interaction%20beyond%20that%20single%20page%20visit%20is%20required%2C%20making%20the%20attack%20practical%20via%20phishing%20or%20malicious%20advertisement.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Replace%20the%20dynamic%20origin%20reflection%20logic%20with%20an%20explicit%20server-side%20allowlist%20containing%20only%20the%20banking%20application's%20own%20trusted%20origin(s).%20Reject%20or%20omit%20the%20CORS%20headers%20entirely%20for%20any%20origin%20not%20on%20the%20allowlist.%5Cn2.%20Never%20combine%20a%20dynamically%20reflected%20or%20wildcard%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%20with%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20%E2%80%94%20this%20combination%20is%20prohibited%20by%20the%20CORS%20specification%20for%20good%20reason.%5Cn3.%20If%20no%20cross-origin%20browser%20access%20is%20required%2C%20remove%20all%20CORS%20response%20headers%20from%20the%20API%20entirely.%5Cn4.%20Audit%20all%20API%20endpoints%20for%20the%20same%20pattern%3B%20evidence%20indicates%20the%20misconfiguration%20is%20present%20application-wide%2C%20not%20limited%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile.%5Cn5.%20Ensure%20the%20API%20response%20never%20exposes%20raw%20password%20hashes%20or%20TOTP%20secrets%20to%20any%20client%2C%20regardless%20of%20CORS%20policy.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20GET%20request%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20was%20issued%20with%20a%20spoofed%20Origin%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fevil.example.com%20header%20and%20a%20valid%20Bearer%20token.%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fevil.example.com%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%2C%20and%20the%20response%20body%20contained%20the%20authenticated%20user's%20profile%20including%20the%20fields%20password_hash%20and%20totp_secret.%20This%20behaviour%20was%20observed%20to%20be%20consistent%20across%20all%20API%20endpoints.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnOrigin%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fevil.example.com%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Btoken%5D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fevil.example.com%5C%5CnAccess-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22%242y%2410%24...%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3Anull%2C...%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Broken%20Access%20Control%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20endpoint%20accepts%20a%20numeric%20transaction%20ID%20in%20the%20URL%20path%20but%20performs%20no%20server-side%20check%20to%20confirm%20that%20the%20requested%20transaction%20belongs%20to%20the%20authenticated%20user.%20Any%20valid%20session%20token%20is%20sufficient%20to%20retrieve%20the%20full%20details%20of%20any%20transaction%20in%20the%20system%20by%20iterating%20the%20integer%20ID.%20The%20response%20includes%20the%20source%20account%20identifier%2C%20destination%20BSB%20and%20account%20number%2C%20transfer%20amount%2C%20free-text%20description%2C%20and%20TOTP%20verification%20status.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Any%20authenticated%20customer%20can%20enumerate%20all%20transaction%20IDs%20and%20read%20the%20complete%20financial%20activity%20of%20every%20other%20customer%20in%20the%20system.%20This%20constitutes%20full%20cross-customer%20exposure%20of%20sensitive%20payment%20data%2C%20including%20counterparty%20account%20details%20and%20transaction%20descriptions%2C%20without%20requiring%20any%20elevated%20privilege.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20Exploitation%20requires%20only%20a%20valid%20user%20account%20and%20the%20ability%20to%20increment%20an%20integer%20in%20a%20URL.%20No%20brute-force%20resistance%2C%20rate%20limiting%2C%20or%20ownership%20validation%20was%20observed%20on%20the%20endpoint.%20Two%20distinct%20test%20accounts%20were%20each%20able%20to%20retrieve%20transactions%20belonging%20to%20the%20other%20with%20a%20single%20unauthenticated-equivalent%20request.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Implement%20a%20server-side%20ownership%20check%20on%20every%20request%20to%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid.%20Before%20returning%20a%20record%2C%20verify%20that%20the%20transaction's%20from_account_id%20is%20associated%20with%20an%20account%20owned%20by%20the%20identity%20in%20the%20authenticated%20JWT%20(sub%20claim).%20If%20the%20transaction%20does%20not%20belong%20to%20the%20requesting%20user%2C%20return%20HTTP%20403%20or%20HTTP%20404%20%E2%80%94%20do%20not%20return%20the%20record.%20This%20check%20must%20be%20enforced%20in%20the%20application%20layer%20and%20cannot%20rely%20on%20the%20client%20supplying%20a%20correct%20identifier.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F1%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Two%20test%20accounts%20were%20used%20to%20confirm%20bidirectional%20cross-customer%20access.%20User%202%20(Wei%20Zhang%2C%20sub%3A2)%20requested%20transaction%20ID%201%2C%20which%20belongs%20to%20User%201%20(Amelia%20Chen%2C%20from_account_id%3A1)%2C%20and%20received%20HTTP%20200%20with%20full%20details%3A%20amount%20%24500.00%2C%20description%20'Monthly%20savings'%2C%20destination%20BSB%20062-001%2C%20account%2010000002.%20User%201%20(Amelia%20Chen%2C%20sub%3A1)%20requested%20transaction%20ID%2010%2C%20which%20belongs%20to%20a%20third%20account%20(from_account_id%3A9)%2C%20and%20received%20HTTP%20200%20with%20amount%20%24400.00%2C%20description%20'Mum%20allowance'%2C%20destination%20BSB%20063-100%2C%20account%2044556677.%20In%20both%20cases%20the%20server%20returned%20complete%20transaction%20records%20for%20transactions%20the%20requesting%20user%20did%20not%20own.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F1%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser2_token%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5CnGET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F10%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser1_token%5D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20200%3A%20%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-001%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2210000002%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_account_id%5C%22%3A2%2C%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A%5C%22500.00%5C%22%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22Monthly%20savings%5C%22%2C...%7D%5C%5CnHTTP%20200%3A%20%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A10%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A9%2C%5C%22to_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22063-100%5C%22%2C%5C%22to_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2244556677%5C%22%2C%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A%5C%22400.00%5C%22%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22Mum%20allowance%5C%22%2C...%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Cryptographic%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Login%20API%20Response%20Leaks%20bcrypt%20Password%20Hash%20and%20TOTP%20Secret%20Field%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20endpoint%20returns%20the%20authenticated%20user's%20internal%20database%20fields%20%E2%80%94%20including%20%60password_hash%60%20(a%20bcrypt%20hash)%20and%20%60totp_secret%60%20%E2%80%94%20directly%20in%20the%20JSON%20response%20body.%20These%20fields%20serve%20no%20legitimate%20client-side%20purpose%20and%20should%20never%20leave%20the%20server.%20The%20issue%20was%20confirmed%20across%20three%20separate%20accounts%3A%20amelia.chen%40example.com%2C%20wei.zhang%40example.com%2C%20and%20noah.campbell%40example.com%2C%20indicating%20this%20is%20a%20systemic%20serialization%20problem%20rather%20than%20an%20isolated%20case.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20a%20login%20response%20%E2%80%94%20through%20network%20interception%2C%20XSS%2C%20a%20compromised%20client%20device%2C%20or%20any%20other%20means%20%E2%80%94%20receives%20the%20target%20user's%20bcrypt%20password%20hash.%20This%20hash%20can%20be%20subjected%20to%20offline%20dictionary%20or%20brute-force%20attacks%20without%20any%20further%20interaction%20with%20the%20server%2C%20bypassing%20account%20lockout%20and%20rate-limiting%20controls%20entirely.%20If%20%60totp_secret%60%20were%20populated%20(it%20is%20currently%20null%20for%20observed%20accounts)%2C%20an%20attacker%20could%20derive%20the%20same%20time-based%20one-time%20passwords%20as%20the%20legitimate%20user%2C%20fully%20cloning%20the%20MFA%20device%20and%20negating%20the%20second%20authentication%20factor.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20Every%20successful%20login%20unconditionally%20returns%20the%20hash.%20Any%20session%20token%20theft%2C%20man-in-the-middle%20position%2C%20or%20client-side%20script%20injection%20that%20can%20read%20the%20response%20body%20immediately%20yields%20the%20hash.%20No%20elevated%20privilege%20or%20special%20condition%20is%20required%20beyond%20completing%20a%20normal%20login.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Implement%20a%20dedicated%20API%20response%20DTO%20(Data%20Transfer%20Object)%20or%20serialization%20allowlist%20for%20the%20user%20object%20returned%20to%20clients.%20The%20response%20should%20include%20only%20fields%20required%20by%20the%20UI%3A%20id%2C%20email%2C%20first_name%2C%20last_name%2C%20phone%2C%20and%20totp_enabled.%20Fields%20such%20as%20%60password_hash%60%2C%20%60totp_secret%60%2C%20and%20any%20other%20internal%20or%20credential-bearing%20columns%20must%20be%20explicitly%20excluded%20at%20the%20serialization%20layer%20%E2%80%94%20not%20filtered%20conditionally%20%E2%80%94%20so%20that%20future%20schema%20additions%20do%20not%20inadvertently%20leak%20new%20sensitive%20fields.%20Audit%20all%20other%20authenticated%20endpoints%20that%20return%20user%20objects%20to%20confirm%20the%20same%20fix%20is%20applied%20consistently.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20to%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20with%20valid%20credentials%20for%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20with%20the%20following%20JSON%20body%2C%20which%20includes%20the%20bcrypt%20password%20hash%20and%20a%20totp_secret%20key%3A%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22user%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Amelia%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Chen%5C%22%2C...%2C%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22%242y%2410%2492IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC%2F.og%2Fat2.uheWG%2Figi%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3Anull%7D%2C%5C%22token%5C%22%3A%5C%22eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...%5C%22%7D%7D.%20The%20same%20behaviour%20was%20confirmed%20for%20wei.zhang%40example.com%20and%20noah.campbell%40example.com.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnContent-Type%3A%20application%2Fjson%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22password%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22user%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Amelia%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Chen%5C%22%2C...%2C%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22%242y%2410%2492IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC%5C%5C%2F.og%5C%5C%2Fat2.uheWG%5C%5C%2Figi%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3Anull%7D%2C%5C%22token%5C%22%3A%5C%22eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...%5C%22%7D%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Identification%20and%20Authentication%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22No%20Rate%20Limiting%20or%20Brute-Force%20Protection%20on%20Admin%20Login%20Endpoint%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20admin%20login%20endpoint%20at%20%60%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%60%20does%20not%20enforce%20any%20rate%20limiting%2C%20account%20lockout%2C%20or%20brute-force%20protection.%20Six%20consecutive%20authentication%20attempts%20using%20incorrect%20passwords%20(%60wrongpass1%60%20through%20%60wrongpass6%60)%20were%20submitted%20without%20any%20throttling%2C%20delay%2C%20or%20lockout%20being%20triggered.%20Each%20request%20returned%20an%20identical%20HTTP%20401%20response%20with%20no%20%60Retry-After%60%2C%20%60X-RateLimit-*%60%2C%20or%20similar%20protective%20headers%20present.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20unauthenticated%20attacker%20can%20submit%20an%20unlimited%20number%20of%20login%20attempts%20against%20the%20admin%20endpoint%20without%20restriction.%20This%20makes%20the%20endpoint%20fully%20susceptible%20to%20automated%20brute-force%20and%20credential-stuffing%20attacks.%20If%20the%20admin%20account%20uses%20a%20weak%20or%20previously%20breached%20password%2C%20an%20attacker%20could%20gain%20full%20administrative%20access%20to%20the%20application.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20endpoint%20is%20unauthenticated%20and%20publicly%20reachable%2C%20requires%20no%20prior%20knowledge%20beyond%20the%20URL%2C%20and%20imposes%20no%20observable%20constraint%20on%20request%20volume.%20Automated%20tooling%20can%20trivially%20enumerate%20passwords%20at%20high%20speed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Implement%20the%20following%20controls%20on%20the%20admin%20login%20endpoint%3A%20(1)%20rate%20limiting%2C%20such%20as%20a%20maximum%20of%205%20failed%20attempts%20per%20source%20IP%20per%2015-minute%20window%2C%20returning%20HTTP%20429%20with%20a%20%60Retry-After%60%20header%3B%20(2)%20progressive%20delays%20after%20repeated%20failures%3B%20(3)%20temporary%20account%20lockout%20after%20a%20configurable%20threshold%20of%20consecutive%20failures%3B%20(4)%20CAPTCHA%20or%20a%20similar%20challenge%20mechanism%20to%20deter%20automated%20submissions%3B%20and%20(5)%20centralised%20logging%20and%20alerting%20on%20anomalous%20authentication%20failure%20patterns%20to%20support%20detection%20and%20incident%20response.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A7.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Six%20consecutive%20POST%20requests%20to%20%60%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%60%20using%20passwords%20%60wrongpass1%60%20through%20%60wrongpass6%60%20each%20returned%20HTTP%20401%20with%20an%20identical%20response%20body%20and%20consistent%20response%20times.%20No%20%60Retry-After%60%2C%20%60X-RateLimit-*%60%2C%20lockout%20message%2C%20CAPTCHA%20challenge%2C%20or%20progressive%20delay%20was%20observed%20across%20any%20of%20the%20six%20attempts.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fauth%2Flogin%20x6%20with%20wrong%20passwords%20%E2%80%94%20no%20lockout%20or%20throttling%20observed%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20401%20%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22error%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22INVALID_CREDENTIALS%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Invalid%20username%20or%20password.%5C%22%7D%7D%20%E2%80%94%20identical%20response%20for%20all%206%20attempts%2C%20no%20rate-limit%20headers%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Cryptographic%20Failures%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Registration%20Endpoint%20Hashes%20Passwords%20with%20Unsalted%20MD5%2C%20Hash%20Exposed%20in%20API%20Response%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20user%20registration%20endpoint%20at%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Fregister%60%20stores%20newly%20created%20passwords%20using%20unsalted%20MD5%20rather%20than%20a%20modern%20password-hashing%20algorithm.%20Existing%20seeded%20users%20have%20their%20passwords%20protected%20with%20bcrypt%20(%60%242y%2410%24...%60)%2C%20indicating%20the%20registration%20code%20path%20diverges%20from%20the%20rest%20of%20the%20application.%20Compounding%20the%20issue%2C%20the%20computed%20hash%20is%20returned%20in%20plaintext%20within%20the%20HTTP%20201%20registration%20response%20body%20and%20is%20also%20present%20in%20subsequent%20profile%20API%20responses%20(e.g.%2C%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%60)%2C%20making%20it%20trivially%20accessible%20to%20any%20client%20that%20registers%20or%20retrieves%20a%20user%20profile.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20obtains%20the%20%60password_hash%60%20field%20%E2%80%94%20which%20is%20actively%20disclosed%20in%20API%20responses%20%E2%80%94%20can%20immediately%20reverse%20common%20passwords%20using%20publicly%20available%20MD5%20rainbow%20tables%20or%20online%20lookup%20services%2C%20or%20crack%20arbitrary%20passwords%20in%20seconds%20using%20GPU-based%20tools.%20Because%20MD5%20is%20unsalted%2C%20identical%20passwords%20produce%20identical%20hashes%2C%20enabling%20bulk%20cracking%20across%20all%20affected%20accounts%20simultaneously.%20This%20effectively%20eliminates%20password%20confidentiality%20for%20every%20user%20registered%20through%20the%20standard%20sign-up%20flow.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20MD5%20hash%20is%20returned%20directly%20in%20the%20registration%20and%20profile%20API%20responses%20without%20requiring%20any%20additional%20exploitation%20step.%20No%20authentication%2C%20elevated%20privilege%2C%20or%20special%20access%20is%20needed%20to%20obtain%20the%20hash%20for%20a%20newly%20registered%20account.%20Reversing%20MD5%20hashes%20for%20common%20passwords%20requires%20no%20specialist%20capability.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Replace%20MD5%20with%20a%20purpose-built%20password%20hashing%20algorithm%20%E2%80%94%20bcrypt%20(cost%20factor%20%E2%89%A5%2012)%2C%20scrypt%2C%20or%20Argon2id%20%E2%80%94%20in%20the%20registration%20code%20path%2C%20consistent%20with%20the%20algorithm%20already%20used%20for%20seeded%20users.%5Cn2.%20Audit%20all%20code%20paths%20that%20handle%20password%20storage%20to%20ensure%20no%20other%20endpoints%20use%20MD5%20or%20SHA-1.%5Cn3.%20Remove%20%60password_hash%60%20(and%20any%20other%20credential-derived%20fields)%20from%20all%20API%20responses%2C%20including%20registration%2C%20login%2C%20and%20profile%20endpoints%20%E2%80%94%20hashed%20passwords%20should%20never%20be%20returned%20to%20clients.%5Cn4.%20Identify%20all%20accounts%20created%20via%20the%20vulnerable%20registration%20path%20and%20force%20a%20password%20reset%2C%20as%20their%20stored%20hashes%20must%20be%20considered%20compromised.%5Cn5.%20After%20remediation%2C%20re-hash%20credentials%20at%20next%20login%20for%20any%20accounts%20that%20could%20not%20be%20reached%20by%20a%20forced%20reset.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Fregister%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Registering%20a%20new%20account%20via%20%60POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Fregister%60%20with%20the%20password%20%60TestPass123!%60%20returned%20the%20HTTP%20201%20response%20body%20containing%20%60%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%20%5C%22480341a0aa25a0d5697a606d49517dfd%5C%22%60%20%E2%80%94%20a%2032-character%20lowercase%20hex%20string%2C%20which%20is%20the%20MD5%20digest%20of%20the%20submitted%20password%20rather%20than%20a%20bcrypt%20hash.%20The%20same%20hash%20was%20confirmed%20present%20in%20the%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%60%20response%20for%20the%20newly%20created%20user%20(ID%2016).%20By%20contrast%2C%20pre-existing%20seeded%20users%20carry%20bcrypt%20hashes%20in%20the%20%60%242y%2410%24...%60%20format%2C%20confirming%20the%20inconsistency%20is%20isolated%20to%20the%20registration%20code%20path.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Fregister%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22test.user.final%40test.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22TestPass123!%5C%22%2C%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22Test%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22User%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22password_hash%5C%22%3A%5C%22480341a0aa25a0d5697a606d49517dfd%5C%22%2C...%7D%20%E2%80%94%20MD5%20hash%2C%20not%20bcrypt%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Injection%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22SQL%20Injection%20in%20Admin%20Customer%20Search%20Parameter%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20%60search%60%20query%20parameter%20accepted%20by%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%60%20is%20concatenated%20directly%20into%20a%20MySQL%20query%20without%20parameterization%20or%20escaping.%20Submitting%20a%20single%20quote%20(%60'%60)%20as%20part%20of%20the%20search%20value%20breaks%20the%20query%20syntax%2C%20triggering%20a%20MySQL%20error%20that%20is%20returned%20verbatim%20in%20the%20HTTP%20500%20response.%20The%20error%20message%20exposes%20the%20raw%20SQL%20fragment%2C%20the%20server-side%20file%20path%20(%60%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2FControllers%2FAdminUserController.php%60)%2C%20the%20line%20number%2C%20and%20a%20partial%20stack%20trace%2C%20confirming%20classic%20error-based%20SQL%20injection.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20who%20holds%20a%20valid%20admin%20session%20token%20can%20exploit%20this%20injection%20point%20to%20read%20arbitrary%20data%20from%20the%20database%2C%20including%20customer%20PII%2C%20account%20balances%2C%20transaction%20history%2C%20and%20password%20hashes.%20The%20verbose%20error%20response%20additionally%20discloses%20internal%20file%20paths%20and%20application%20structure%2C%20reducing%20the%20effort%20required%20to%20develop%20further%20exploits.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Exploitation%20requires%20a%20valid%20admin-level%20Bearer%20token.%20An%20attacker%20who%20has%20obtained%20or%20compromised%20admin%20credentials%20can%20immediately%20leverage%20this%20vulnerability%20to%20extract%20the%20full%20database%20contents.%20No%20additional%20preconditions%20or%20complex%20techniques%20are%20needed%20beyond%20issuing%20a%20crafted%20GET%20request.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Replace%20all%20dynamic%20SQL%20string%20concatenation%20with%20parameterized%20queries%20(PDO%20prepared%20statements%20with%20bound%20parameters)%20throughout%20the%20application%2C%20starting%20with%20%60AdminUserController.php%60%20line%2028.%202.%20Audit%20all%20other%20controller%20endpoints%20for%20the%20same%20pattern.%203.%20Suppress%20detailed%20error%20messages%2C%20stack%20traces%2C%20and%20file%20paths%20from%20API%20responses%20in%20production%20environments%20%E2%80%94%20capture%20this%20information%20in%20server-side%20logs%20only%20and%20return%20a%20generic%20error%20message%20to%20the%20client.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.8%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AH%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Sending%20%60GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dadmin'%60%20with%20a%20valid%20admin%20Bearer%20token%20returned%20HTTP%20500%20with%20a%20MySQL%20syntax%20error%20confirming%20unsanitized%20input%20injection%3A%20%60SQLSTATE%5B42000%5D%3A%20Syntax%20error%20or%20access%20violation%3A%201064%20You%20have%20an%20error%20in%20your%20SQL%20syntax%20...%20near%20'%25'%20OR%20last_name%20LIKE%20'%25admin'%25'%20OR%20email%20LIKE%20'%25admin'%25''%60.%20The%20response%20also%20disclosed%20the%20source%20file%20path%20%60%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2FControllers%2FAdminUserController.php%60%20at%20line%2028%20and%20a%20PDO%20stack%20trace.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Fadmin%2Fcustomers%3Fsearch%3Dadmin'%20HTTP%2F1.1%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Badmin_token%5D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20500%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Afalse%2C%5C%22error%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22INTERNAL_ERROR%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22SQLSTATE%5B42000%5D%3A%20Syntax%20error%20or%20access%20violation%3A%201064%20You%20have%20an%20error%20in%20your%20SQL%20syntax%3B%20check%20the%20manual%20that%20corresponds%20to%20your%20MySQL%20server%20version%20for%20the%20right%20syntax%20to%20use%20near%20'%25'%20OR%20last_name%20LIKE%20'%25admin'%25'%20OR%20email%20LIKE%20'%25admin'%25''%20at%20line%201%5C%22%2C%5C%22details%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22file%5C%22%3A%5C%22%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2FControllers%2FAdminUserController.php%5C%22%2C%5C%22line%5C%22%3A28%2C%5C%22trace%5C%22%3A%5C%22%230%20%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2FControllers%2FAdminUserController.php(28)%3A%20PDO-%3Equery()...%5C%22%7D%7D%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A04%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Insecure%20Design%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22high%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Unrestricted%20Loan%20Account%20Drawdown%20via%20Transfer%20Endpoints%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20transfer%20endpoints%20at%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%20and%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20perform%20no%20server-side%20validation%20of%20the%20source%20account%20type.%20A%20customer%20can%20specify%20a%20loan%20account%20(e.g.%2C%20account_id%203%2C%20a%20Home%20Loan)%20as%20the%20from_account%20in%20a%20transfer%20request%2C%20causing%20the%20loan%20balance%20to%20be%20debited%20%E2%80%94%20effectively%20drawing%20down%20on%20the%20loan%20%E2%80%94%20without%20any%20redraw%20eligibility%20check%2C%20approved%20redraw%20limit%2C%20credit%20assessment%2C%20or%20bank%20authorisation.%20This%20behaviour%20is%20present%20for%20both%20internal%20(own-account)%20and%20external%20transfers%2C%20meaning%20loan%20funds%20can%20be%20directed%20to%20third-party%20accounts%20with%20no%20controls%20applied.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20customer%20can%20unilaterally%20increase%20their%20loan%20liability%20to%20an%20arbitrary%20amount%20by%20repeatedly%20initiating%20transfers%20from%20a%20loan%20account.%20This%20bypasses%20all%20redraw%20controls%2C%20credit%20limits%2C%20and%20approval%20workflows%20that%20would%20ordinarily%20govern%20loan%20drawdowns.%20The%20bank%20bears%20the%20resulting%20financial%20exposure%2C%20as%20funds%20are%20disbursed%20without%20any%20corresponding%20approval%20or%20eligibility%20verification.%20External%20transfers%20extend%20this%20risk%20to%20third-party%20beneficiaries%2C%20making%20recovery%20more%20difficult.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22High.%20The%20attack%20requires%20only%20a%20valid%20customer%20session%20and%20knowledge%20of%20the%20loan%20account%20ID%2C%20both%20of%20which%20are%20available%20to%20any%20legitimate%20account%20holder.%20No%20elevated%20privileges%2C%20special%20tooling%2C%20or%20complex%20exploitation%20chain%20is%20required%20%E2%80%94%20a%20standard%20authenticated%20API%20call%20is%20sufficient.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Implement%20server-side%20account-type%20validation%20within%20both%20transfer%20handlers.%20Loan%20accounts%20must%20not%20be%20accepted%20as%20source%20accounts%20for%20customer-initiated%20transfers%20unless%20a%20separate%2C%20explicitly%20approved%20redraw%20facility%20is%20in%20place.%20Specifically%3A%20(1)%20reject%20any%20transfer%20request%20where%20the%20source%20account%20type%20is%20'loan'%20by%20default%3B%20(2)%20introduce%20a%20redraw%20eligibility%20check%20that%20verifies%20an%20approved%20redraw%20limit%20exists%20before%20permitting%20drawdown%3B%20(3)%20enforce%20server-side%20redraw%20limit%20caps%20so%20that%20cumulative%20drawdowns%20cannot%20exceed%20the%20approved%20facility%3B%20(4)%20route%20any%20redraw%20request%20through%20an%20appropriate%20authorisation%20workflow%20rather%20than%20processing%20it%20inline%20with%20standard%20transfers.%20These%20controls%20must%20be%20enforced%20on%20the%20server%20%E2%80%94%20client-side%20restrictions%20alone%20are%20insufficient.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A8.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AH%2FA%3AH%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Using%20an%20authenticated%20session%20(user1_token)%2C%20a%20POST%20request%20to%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%20specified%20loan%20account_id%203%20(Home%20Loan%2C%20balance%20%E2%80%93%24285%2C000)%20as%20the%20source.%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20and%20recorded%20a%20new%20loan%20balance%20of%20%E2%80%93%24285%2C100%2C%20confirming%20%24100%20was%20drawn%20from%20the%20loan%20and%20credited%20to%20savings%20account_id%201%20with%20no%20approval%20or%20eligibility%20check.%20A%20subsequent%20POST%20to%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fexternal%20using%20the%20same%20loan%20account%20as%20source%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20with%20a%20new%20balance%20of%20%E2%80%93%24285%2C600%2C%20demonstrating%20that%20%24500%20was%20transferred%20externally%20from%20the%20loan%20account.%20In%20both%20cases%20the%20response%20status%20was%20'completed'%20and%20no%20redraw%20validation%20was%20performed.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Ftransfers%2Fown%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser1_token%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A100%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A3%2C%5C%22to_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22transfer_type%5C%22%3A%5C%22own%5C%22%2C%5C%22description%5C%22%3A%5C%22loan%20account%20source%20test%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22transaction_id%5C%22%3A37%2C%5C%22from_account_id%5C%22%3A3%2C%5C%22to_account_id%5C%22%3A1%2C%5C%22amount%5C%22%3A%5C%22100%5C%22%2C%5C%22new_from_balance%5C%22%3A%5C%22-285100.00%5C%22%2C%5C%22new_to_balance%5C%22%3A%5C%223549.75%5C%22%2C%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22completed%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A02%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22medium%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Sensitive%20data%20exposed%20in%20API%20response%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20response%20contains%20field%20names%20commonly%20associated%20with%20secrets%2C%20hashes%2C%20tokens%2C%20debug%20state%2C%20or%20privileged%20metadata.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Attackers%20can%20use%20leaked%20secrets%20or%20implementation%20details%20to%20compromise%20accounts%20or%20chain%20further%20attacks.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Confirmed%20by%20deterministic%20response%20analysis.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Remove%20sensitive%20fields%20from%20client-facing%20responses%20and%20enforce%20response%20DTO%20allow-lists.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A6.5%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22REQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20text%2Fjavascript%5Cn%5Cn%2F**%5Cn%20*%20BankOfEd%20Admin%20-%20App%20Bootstrap%5Cn%20*%2F%5Cnwindow.BankOfEdAdmin%20%3D%20window.BankOfEdAdmin%20%7C%7C%20%7B%7D%3B%5Cn%5CnBankOfEdAdmin.App%20%3D%20(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20'use%20strict'%3B%5Cn%20%20var%20U%20%3D%20BankOfEdAdmin.Utils%3B%5Cn%20%20var%20Api%20%3D%20BankOfEdAdmin.Api%3B%5Cn%20%20var%20Router%20%3D%20BankOfEdAdmin.Router%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20init()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.addRoute('%2Flogin'%2C%20function%20()%20%7B%20BankOfEdAdmin.AuthPage.show()%3B%20%7D%2C%20%7B%20auth%3A%20false%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.addRoute('%2Fcustomers'%2C%20function%20()%20%7B%20BankOfEdAdmin.CustomersPage.show()%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.addRoute('%2Fcustomers%2F%3Aid'%2C%20function%20(params)%20%7B%20BankOfEdAdmin.CustomersPage.showDetail(params)%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.addRoute('%2Faccounts'%2C%20function%20()%20%7B%20BankOfEdAdmin.AccountsPage.show()%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.addRoute('%2Ffx-rates'%2C%20function%20()%20%7B%20BankOfEdAdmin.FxRatesPage.show()%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.addRoute('%2Fsystem'%2C%20function%20()%20%7B%20BankOfEdAdmin.SystemPage.show()%3B%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(Api.isLoggedIn())%20updateSidebar()%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Router.start()%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20updateSidebar()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20admin%20%3D%20Api.getAdmin()%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(!admin)%20return%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20avatar%20%3D%20U.%24('sidebar-avatar')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20name%20%3D%20U.%24('sidebar-admin-name')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(avatar)%20avatar.textContent%20%3D%20(admin.username%20%7C%7C%20'A')%5B0%5D.toUpperCase()%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(name)%20name.textContent%20%3D%20admin.username%20%7C%7C%20'Admin'%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20toggleSidebar()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20sidebar%20%3D%20U.%24('sidebar')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20overlay%20%3D%20U.%24('sidebar-overlay')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(sidebar.classList.contains('-translate-x-full'))%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20sidebar.classList.remove('-translate-x-full')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20overlay.classList.remove('hidden')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D%20else%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20sidebar.classList.add('-translate-x-full')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20overlay.classList.add('hidden')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20logout()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20Api.logout().catch(function%20()%20%7B%7D).finally(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20Api.clearToken()%3B%20Api.clearAdmin()%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20U.toast('Signed%20out.'%2C%20'info')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20window.location.hash%20%3D%20'%23%2Flogin'%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20if%20(document.readyState%20%3D%3D%3D%20'loading')%20document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded'%2C%20init)%3B%5Cn%20%20else%20init()%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20return%20%7B%20init%3A%20init%2C%20updateSidebar%3A%20updateSidebar%2C%20toggleSidebar%3A%20toggleSidebar%2C%20logout%3A%20logout%20%7D%3B%5Cn%7D)()%3B%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2Fjs%2Fapp.js%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnActor%3A%20anonymous%5CnAuthorization%3A%20none%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A13%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnlast-modified%3A%20Tue%2C%2017%20Feb%202026%2003%3A13%3A53%20GMT%5Cnetag%3A%20%5C%227cd-64afc760c5e40-gzip%5C%22%5Cnaccept-ranges%3A%20bytes%5Cnvary%3A%20Accept-Encoding%5Cncontent-encoding%3A%20gzip%5Cncontent-length%3A%20719%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20text%2Fjavascript%5Cn%5Cn%2F**%5Cn%20*%20BankOfEd%20Admin%20-%20App%20Bootstrap%5Cn%20*%2F%5Cnwi %2Fjavascript%5Cn%5Cn%2F**%5Cn%20*%20BankOfEd%20Admin%20-%20System%20Page%5Cn%20*%2F%5Cnwindow.BankOfEdAdmin%20%3D%20window.BankOfEdAdmin%20%7C%7C%20%7B%7D%3B%5Cn%5CnBankOfEdAdmin.SystemPage%20%3D%20(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20'use%20strict'%3B%5Cn%20%20var%20U%20%3D%20BankOfEdAdmin.Utils%3B%5Cn%20%20var%20Api%20%3D%20BankOfEdAdmin.Api%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20show()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20BankOfEdAdmin.Router.showPage('system'%2C%20'system')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20input%20%3D%20U.%24('reset-confirm-input')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(input)%20input.value%20%3D%20''%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20function%20handleReset()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20input%20%3D%20U.%24('reset-confirm-input')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20if%20(!input%20%7C%7C%20input.value%20!%3D%3D%20'RESET')%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20U.toast('Please%20type%20RESET%20to%20confirm.'%2C%20'warning')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20return%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20%20%20var%20btn%20%3D%20U.%24('reset-btn')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20U.setButtonLoading(btn%2C%20true)%3B%5Cn%5Cn%20%20%20%20Api.resetDatabase().then(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20input.value%20%3D%20''%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20U.toast('Database%20reset%20successfully!'%2C%20'success')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D).catch(function%20(err)%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20U.toast(err.message%20%7C%7C%20'Reset%20failed.'%2C%20'error')%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D).finally(function%20()%20%7B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%20%20U.setButtonLoading(btn%2C%20false)%3B%5Cn%20%20%20%20%7D)%3B%5Cn%20%20%7D%5Cn%5Cn%20%20return%20%7B%20show%3A%20show%2C%20handleReset%3A%20handleReset%20%7D%3B%5Cn%7D)()%3B%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2Fjs%2Fpages%2Fsystem.js%20HTTP%2F1.1%5CnActor%3A%20anonymous%5CnAuthorization%3A%20none%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%2F1.1%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A13%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection 0a%20minimum%20password%20length%20of%20at%20least%2012%20characters%20and%20reject%20passwords%20found%20in%20common%20breach%20lists%20(e.g.%2C%20using%20the%20HIBP%20API%20or%20a%20local%20blocklist).%20Return%20a%20clear%20validation%20error%20when%20the%20policy%20is%20not%20met.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A5.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%20118%3A%20password%20'a'%20accepted%2C%20HTTP%20201%20returned.%20Step%20119%3A%20password%20'123'%20accepted%2C%20HTTP%20201%20returned.%20No%20validation%20error%20was%20produced%20in%20either%20case.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22env
