including%20absolute%20file%20paths%20(%2Fvar%2Fwww%2Fbankofed%2Fsrc%2F...)%2C%20class%20names%2C%20method%20signatures%2C%20and%20line%20numbers%20in%20the%20JSON%20error%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20gains%20detailed%20knowledge%20of%20the%20server's%20directory%20structure%2C%20framework%20internals%2C%20and%20code%20flow%2C%20which%20materially%20assists%20in%20targeting%20further%20attacks%20against%20the%20application.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Reproducible%20by%20any%20unauthenticated%20request%20to%20protected%20endpoints%20such%20as%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20or%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Frates.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Disable%20detailed%20error%20output%20in%20production%20(set%20environment%3Dproduction%20error%20handling%20to%20return%20only%20a%20generic%20error%20code%20and%20message).%20Log%20full%20stack%20traces%20server-side%20only.%20Implement%20a%20global%20exception%20handler%20that%20sanitises%20responses%20before%20they%20reach%20the%20client.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A5.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20(no%20auth)%20returned%20HTTP%20500%20with%3A%20%7B%5C%22file%5C%22%3A%5C%22%5C%5C%2Fvar%5C%5C%2Fwww%5C%5C%2Fbankofed%5C%5C%2Fsrc%5C%5C%2FServices%5C%5C%2FAuthService.php%5C%22%2C%5C%22line%5C%22%3A77%2C%5C%22trace%5C%22%3A%5C%22%230%20%5C%5C%2Fvar%5C%5C%2Fwww%5C%5C%2Fbankofed%5C%5C%2Fsrc%5C%5C%2FMiddleware%5C%5C%2FAuthMiddleware.php(28)...%5C%22%7D%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Security%20Misconfiguration%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22medium%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Missing%20Content-Security-Policy%20and%20HSTS%20Headers%20on%20Admin%20Panel%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22A%20GET%20request%20to%20the%20admin%20panel%20at%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%20revealed%20that%20the%20HTTP%20response%20omits%20both%20a%20Content-Security-Policy%20(CSP)%20header%20and%20a%20Strict-Transport-Security%20(HSTS)%20header.%20While%20several%20defensive%20headers%20are%20present%20(X-Content-Type-Options%2C%20X-Frame-Options%2C%20X-XSS-Protection%2C%20and%20Referrer-Policy)%2C%20the%20absence%20of%20CSP%20means%20the%20browser%20applies%20no%20policy%20restricting%20which%20scripts%2C%20stylesheets%2C%20or%20external%20resources%20may%20load.%20The%20absence%20of%20HSTS%20means%20the%20browser%20will%20not%20enforce%20HTTPS%20for%20subsequent%20visits%2C%20leaving%20the%20panel%20accessible%20over%20plain%20HTTP.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22Without%20CSP%2C%20any%20cross-site%20scripting%20vulnerability%20discovered%20on%20the%20admin%20panel%20would%20face%20no%20browser-level%20restriction%20on%20script%20execution%20or%20resource%20loading%2C%20increasing%20the%20exploitability%20and%20potential%20impact%20of%20such%20a%20finding.%20Without%20HSTS%2C%20an%20attacker%20in%20a%20position%20to%20intercept%20network%20traffic%20(e.g.%2C%20on%20the%20same%20network%20segment)%20could%20downgrade%20the%20connection%20to%20HTTP%20and%20capture%20admin%20credentials%20or%20session%20tokens%20in%20transit.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22The%20missing%20headers%20are%20a%20configuration%20gap%20rather%20than%20a%20directly%20exploitable%20vulnerability.%20Exploitation%20requires%20either%20a%20separate%20XSS%20injection%20point%20(for%20CSP)%20or%20a%20network-level%20interception%20opportunity%20(for%20HSTS).%20Practical%20risk%20is%20therefore%20limited%20without%20one%20of%20these%20preconditions%20being%20met.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Add%20a%20Content-Security-Policy%20header%20to%20the%20admin%20panel%20response.%20A%20restrictive%20starting%20policy%20would%20be%3A%20%60default-src%20'self'%3B%20script-src%20'self'%20cdn.tailwindcss.com%3B%20style-src%20'self'%20fonts.googleapis.com%3B%20object-src%20'none'%60.%20Note%20that%20the%20admin%20panel%20currently%20loads%20resources%20from%20cdn.tailwindcss.com%20and%20fonts.googleapis.com%2C%20so%20these%20origins%20must%20be%20included%20in%20the%20allowlist.%20Tighten%20the%20policy%20iteratively%20using%20CSP%20reporting%20mode%20before%20enforcing%20it.%5Cn2.%20Add%20a%20Strict-Transport-Security%20header%3A%20%60Strict-Transport-Security%3A%20max-age%3D31536000%3B%20includeSubDomains%60.%20Ensure%20the%20application%20is%20fully%20accessible%20over%20HTTPS%20before%20enabling%20HSTS%20to%20avoid%20locking%20out%20users.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A4.3%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fadmin%2F%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fadmin%2F%20HTTP%2F1.1%20returned%20HTTP%20200.%20Observed%20response%20headers%20included%3A%20x-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%2C%20x-frame-options%3A%20DENY%2C%20x-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%2C%20referrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin.%20Neither%20a%20Content-Security-Policy%20header%20nor%20a%20Strict-Transport-Security%20header%20was%20present%20in%20the%20response.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fadmin%2F%20HTTP%2F1.1%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Response%20headers%20contain%20no%20Content-Security-Policy%20or%20Strict-Transport-Security%20headers.%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Injection%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22medium%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Stored%20XSS%20via%20Address%20Book%20Nickname%20and%20Payee%20Name%20Fields%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%20and%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%2F%3Aid%20endpoints%20accept%20and%20persist%20arbitrary%20HTML%20and%20JavaScript%20in%20the%20nickname%20and%20payee_name%20fields%20without%20any%20input%20sanitisation.%20The%20stored%20payload%20is%20returned%20verbatim%20in%20subsequent%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%20responses.%20If%20the%20banking%20portal%20renders%20these%20fields%20without%20HTML-encoding%20%E2%80%94%20for%20example%2C%20in%20a%20payee%20dropdown%20or%20address%20book%20list%20%E2%80%94%20the%20stored%20script%20will%20execute%20in%20the%20victim's%20browser.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20authenticated%20attacker%20can%20store%20a%20malicious%20payload%20that%20executes%20in%20the%20browser%20of%20any%20user%20who%20views%20their%20address%20book%2C%20including%20the%20attacker's%20own%20session%20if%20shared%20or%20accessed%20by%20support%20staff.%20If%20the%20admin%20panel%20renders%20payee%20data%20without%20encoding%2C%20the%20payload%20could%20also%20execute%20in%20an%20administrative%20session%2C%20potentially%20enabling%20session%20hijacking%2C%20credential%20theft%2C%20or%20unauthorised%20actions%20on%20behalf%20of%20the%20victim.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Exploitation%20requires%20an%20authenticated%20session%20to%20write%20the%20payload%2C%20and%20a%20separate%20victim%20to%20view%20the%20rendered%20address%20book%20in%20a%20context%20where%20the%20application%20does%20not%20HTML-encode%20the%20field.%20Both%20conditions%20are%20plausible%20in%20a%20multi-user%20banking%20portal.%20Severity%20is%20constrained%20by%20the%20requirement%20for%20victim%20interaction%20and%20the%20unconfirmed%20rendering%20behaviour%20of%20the%20front-end.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Sanitise%20all%20user-supplied%20input%20at%20write%20time%2C%20rejecting%20or%20stripping%20HTML%20markup%20from%20nickname%20and%20payee_name%20fields%20%E2%80%94%20these%20should%20accept%20printable%20text%20only.%20HTML-encode%20all%20dynamic%20field%20values%20at%20render%20time%20regardless%20of%20stored%20content.%20Implement%20a%20strict%20Content%20Security%20Policy%20that%20disallows%20inline%20script%20execution.%20Apply%20the%20same%20controls%20to%20any%20admin-facing%20views%20that%20display%20address%20book%20data.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A5.4%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20POST%20request%20to%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%20with%20the%20nickname%20value%20set%20to%20%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert(1)%3E%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20and%20stored%20the%20payload%20verbatim.%20A%20subsequent%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%20confirmed%20the%20unmodified%20payload%20was%20persisted%20and%20returned%20in%20the%20listing%20response.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser2_token%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22nickname%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert(1)%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22payee_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22XSS%20Test%5C%22%2C%5C%22payee_bsb%5C%22%3A%5C%22062-001%5C%22%2C%5C%22payee_account_number%5C%22%3A%5C%2212345678%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20201%3A%20%7B%5C%22id%5C%22%3A20%2C%5C%22nickname%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert(1)%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22payee_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22XSS%20Test%5C%22%2C...%7D%5C%5CnGET%20%2Fapi%2Faddress-book%20%E2%86%92%20same%20payload%20returned%20in%20listing%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%3A2021%20%E2%80%93%20Injection%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22medium%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Stored%20XSS%20via%20Profile%20Update%20%E2%80%94%20Unsanitised%20HTML%20Persisted%20in%20Customer%20Name%20Fields%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20endpoint%20accepts%20and%20persistently%20stores%20arbitrary%20HTML%20and%20JavaScript%20in%20user-controlled%20profile%20fields%20(e.g.%2C%20first_name%2C%20last_name)%20without%20any%20sanitisation%20or%20encoding.%20The%20raw%20payload%20is%20returned%20verbatim%20in%20all%20subsequent%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20and%20login%20responses.%20Should%20the%20admin%20panel%20render%20these%20fields%20without%20HTML-encoding%2C%20the%20stored%20payload%20would%20execute%20as%20JavaScript%20in%20the%20administrator's%20browser%20when%20viewing%20customer%20records.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20the%20admin%20panel%20renders%20customer%20name%20fields%20without%20output%20encoding%2C%20an%20authenticated%20attacker%20could%20execute%20arbitrary%20JavaScript%20in%20an%20administrator's%20browser%20session.%20Successful%20exploitation%20could%20lead%20to%20session%20hijacking%2C%20credential%20theft%2C%20or%20further%20lateral%20movement%20within%20the%20application.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Exploitation%20requires%20an%20administrator%20to%20view%20the%20affected%20customer%20record%20in%20a%20rendering%20context%20that%20does%20not%20HTML-encode%20the%20stored%20value.%20The%20payload%20is%20confirmed%20stored%20and%20returned%20verbatim%20by%20the%20API%3B%20exploitability%20is%20therefore%20contingent%20on%20the%20admin%20panel's%20output%20handling%2C%20which%20was%20not%20fully%20verified%20during%20testing.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%221.%20Sanitise%20all%20user-supplied%20input%20on%20write%3A%20strip%20or%20reject%20HTML%20tags%20in%20profile%20fields%20that%20have%20no%20legitimate%20need%20for%20markup.%202.%20HTML-encode%20all%20user-controlled%20values%20at%20every%20output%20context%20(admin%20panel%2C%20customer%20portal%2C%20API%20responses%20consumed%20by%20a%20browser).%203.%20Implement%20a%20strict%20Content%20Security%20Policy%20(CSP)%20to%20limit%20inline%20script%20execution%20as%20a%20defence-in-depth%20control.%204.%20Apply%20the%20same%20controls%20to%20all%20profile%20fields%2C%20not%20only%20first_name%20and%20last_name.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A5.4%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fprofile%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22A%20PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%20request%20was%20submitted%20with%20first_name%20set%20to%20%5C%22%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C%2Fscript%3E%5C%22.%20The%20server%20returned%20HTTP%20200%20and%20persisted%20the%20payload%20verbatim%2C%20as%20confirmed%20in%20the%20response%20body%3A%20%7B%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C%5C%5C%2Fscript%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22XSSTest%5C%22%2C...%7D.%20The%20value%20was%20present%20in%20all%20subsequent%20profile%20responses%2C%20confirming%20server-side%20storage%20without%20sanitisation.%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22PUT%20%2Fapi%2Fprofile%5C%5CnAuthorization%3A%20Bearer%20%5Buser1_token%5D%5C%5Cn%5C%5Cn%7B%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C%2Fscript%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22XSSTest%5C%22%2C...%7D%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22HTTP%20200%3A%20%7B%5C%22first_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C%5C%5C%2Fscript%3E%5C%22%2C%5C%22last_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22XSSTest%5C%22%2C%5C%22totp_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22A2SZC3UPM6EUVFNFTZTKNP3EK5PYSXBZBY7SB5UBEPEJUPH5WZ6JC3RS6GYYXOZWYBEMZ46ECS5M6HLZCUEUSDVRGIFCZMIYWD4JVRQ%5C%22%2C...%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22alice%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22unvalidated%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3Anull%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%60%20combined%20with%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%60.%20Additionally%2C%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Headers%3A%20*%60%20and%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%60%20are%20set%20globally%2C%20including%20on%20unauthenticated%20endpoints.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22The%20combination%20of%20wildcard%20origin%20with%20credentials%20is%20technically%20invalid%20per%20the%20CORS%20specification%20(browsers%20will%20block%20it%20for%20credentialed%20requests)%2C%20but%20the%20permissive%20header%20policy%20may%20interact%20unexpectedly%20with%20certain%20clients%20or%20proxies.%20The%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Headers%3A%20*%60%20wildcard%20may%20expose%20custom%20security%20headers%20to%20cross-origin%20inspection.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20practical%20browser-exploitability%20due%20to%20spec%20enforcement%2C%20but%20represents%20a%20misconfiguration%20that%20should%20be%20corrected.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Set%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Origin%60%20to%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins%20rather%20than%20%60*%60.%20Remove%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%60%20unless%20cross-origin%20credentialed%20requests%20are%20genuinely%20required.%20Enumerate%20specific%20allowed%20headers%20rather%20than%20using%20a%20wildcard.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20headers%3A%20%60access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%60%2C%20%60access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%60%2C%20%60access-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%60%2C%20%60access-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%60.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20both%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20simultaneously.%20While%20browsers%20will%20not%20honour%20credentials%20with%20a%20wildcard%20origin%20per%20the%20CORS%20specification%2C%20this%20configuration%20indicates%20the%20CORS%20policy%20has%20not%20been%20properly%20designed.%20If%20the%20wildcard%20is%20ever%20replaced%20with%20arbitrary%20origin%20reflection%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration%20step)%2C%20authenticated%20cross-origin%20data%20theft%20becomes%20immediately%20exploitable.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22In%20the%20current%20state%2C%20browsers%20block%20credentialed%20requests%20to%20wildcard%20origins%2C%20limiting%20direct%20exploitation.%20However%2C%20the%20misconfiguration%20signals%20a%20lack%20of%20CORS%20hardening%20and%20could%20become%20a%20high-severity%20issue%20if%20the%20origin%20handling%20is%20changed%20to%20reflective.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20for%20direct%20exploitation%20in%20current%20form%20due%20to%20browser%20enforcement.%20The%20risk%20is%20elevated%20by%20the%20fact%20that%20the%20admin%20panel%20is%20already%20unauthenticated%2C%20making%20CORS%20less%20relevant%20for%20those%20endpoints.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Remove%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20from%20responses%20that%20use%20a%20wildcard%20origin.%20For%20endpoints%20that%20genuinely%20require%20credentialed%20cross-origin%20access%2C%20explicitly%20whitelist%20trusted%20origins%20rather%20than%20using%20a%20wildcard%2C%20and%20validate%20the%20Origin%20header%20server-side%20against%20that%20whitelist.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20headers%3A%20access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%20and%20access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true.%20Example%20observed%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Frates%20(HTTP%20200)%20and%20all%20other%20API%20endpoints%20tested.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20the%20headers%20'Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*'%20and%20'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true'%20simultaneously.%20Additionally%2C%20Access-Control-Allow-Headers%20is%20set%20to%20'*'%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Methods%20permits%20all%20HTTP%20verbs.%20While%20browsers%20block%20credentialed%20requests%20to%20a%20wildcard%20origin%2C%20the%20combination%20signals%20a%20misconfigured%20CORS%20policy%20that%20may%20be%20trivially%20changed%20to%20reflect%20arbitrary%20origins.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20the%20wildcard%20is%20ever%20changed%20to%20reflect%20the%20request%20Origin%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration%20step)%2C%20any%20malicious%20website%20could%20make%20credentialed%20cross-origin%20requests%20to%20the%20API%20and%20read%20sensitive%20banking%20data%20on%20behalf%20of%20authenticated%20users.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Currently%20browsers%20enforce%20the%20wildcard%20restriction%2C%20so%20direct%20exploitation%20is%20blocked.%20However%20the%20policy%20is%20one%20configuration%20change%20away%20from%20full%20CORS%20bypass.%20The%20misconfiguration%20is%20present%20on%20every%20API%20endpoint%20observed.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Set%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%20to%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins.%20Remove%20the%20wildcard.%20Do%20not%20combine%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20with%20a%20wildcard%20or%20reflective%20origin%20policy.%20Restrict%20Access-Control-Allow-Methods%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Headers%20to%20only%20what%20is%20required.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Every%20observed%20API%20response%20includes%3A%20'access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*'%2C%20'access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true'%2C%20'access-control-allow-headers%3A%20*'%2C%20'access-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD'.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%20combined%20with%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%2C%20Access-Control-Allow-Methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%2C%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Headers%3A%20*.%20This%20configuration%20is%20invalid%20per%20the%20CORS%20specification%20(credentials%20cannot%20be%20used%20with%20wildcard%20origin)%20but%20indicates%20an%20intent%20to%20allow%20broad%20cross-origin%20access.%20The%20wildcard%20on%20headers%20also%20permits%20any%20custom%20header.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22While%20browsers%20block%20credentialed%20requests%20with%20a%20wildcard%20origin%2C%20the%20configuration%20signals%20a%20lack%20of%20CORS%20hardening.%20If%20the%20wildcard%20is%20ever%20changed%20to%20reflect%20the%20requesting%20origin%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration)%2C%20authenticated%20cross-origin%20requests%20would%20be%20possible%2C%20allowing%20a%20malicious%20site%20to%20call%20admin%20APIs%20on%20behalf%20of%20a%20logged-in%20admin.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20in%20current%20form%20due%20to%20browser%20enforcement%2C%20but%20the%20configuration%20is%20incorrect%20and%20represents%20a%20latent%20risk%20if%20the%20implementation%20changes.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Set%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%20to%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins.%20Remove%20the%20wildcard%20from%20Access-Control-Allow-Headers%20and%20enumerate%20only%20required%20headers.%20Ensure%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20is%20only%20set%20when%20a%20specific%20trusted%20origin%20is%20reflected.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%2037%2F46%3A%20Response%20headers%20include%20'access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*'%2C%20'access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true'%2C%20'access-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD'%2C%20'access-control-allow-headers%3A%20*'%20on%20all%20%2Fapi%2F*%20responses.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20both%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true.%20While%20browsers%20will%20not%20send%20cookies%20with%20a%20wildcard%20origin%2C%20the%20combination%20is%20a%20misconfiguration%20and%20indicates%20the%20CORS%20policy%20has%20not%20been%20carefully%20designed.%20If%20the%20origin%20is%20ever%20changed%20to%20reflect%20the%20requesting%20origin%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration%20step)%2C%20it%20would%20immediately%20enable%20cross-origin%20credential%20theft.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22In%20the%20current%20state%2C%20browser-enforced%20CORS%20prevents%20credential-bearing%20cross-origin%20reads.%20However%2C%20the%20misconfigured%20header%20pair%20signals%20a%20policy%20that%20is%20one%20configuration%20change%20away%20from%20allowing%20any%20origin%20to%20read%20authenticated%20API%20responses.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20in%20current%20form%20due%20to%20browser%20enforcement%20of%20the%20wildcard%2Fcredentials%20combination.%20Risk%20escalates%20significantly%20if%20the%20server%20is%20later%20changed%20to%20reflect%20arbitrary%20origins.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Remove%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20if%20a%20wildcard%20origin%20is%20intended.%20If%20credentialed%20cross-origin%20requests%20are%20required%2C%20explicitly%20whitelist%20trusted%20origins%20and%20validate%20the%20Origin%20header%20server-side%20against%20that%20whitelist.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20headers%3A%20access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%20and%20access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%20simultaneously%2C%20which%20is%20a%20contradictory%20and%20misconfigured%20CORS%20policy.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3 ction%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20both%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20simultaneously.%20While%20browsers%20block%20credentialed%20requests%20to%20a%20wildcard%20origin%20per%20the%20CORS%20spec%2C%20the%20combination%20indicates%20a%20misconfigured%20policy.%20Additionally%2C%20Access-Control-Allow-Headers%3A%20*%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Methods%20including%20all%20verbs%20are%20set%2C%20creating%20an%20overly%20permissive%20CORS%20surface.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20the%20wildcard%20is%20ever%20replaced%20with%20arbitrary%20origin%20reflection%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration%20step)%2C%20authenticated%20cross-origin%20requests%20would%20succeed%2C%20allowing%20any%20website%20to%20read%20sensitive%20API%20responses%20on%20behalf%20of%20a%20logged-in%20user.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Currently%20partially%20mitigated%20by%20browser%20enforcement%20of%20the%20wildcard%2Bcredentials%20restriction%2C%20but%20the%20configuration%20is%20one%20change%20away%20from%20full%20exploitation%20and%20indicates%20absent%20CORS%20governance.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Set%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%20to%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins.%20Remove%20the%20wildcard.%20Restrict%20Access-Control-Allow-Methods%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Headers%20to%20only%20what%20is%20required.%20Never%20combine%20a%20wildcard%20origin%20with%20Allow-Credentials%3A%20true.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20headers%3A%20%5C%22access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22access-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5C%22%2C%20%5C%22access-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5C%22.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20'Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*'%20combined%20with%20'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true'%20and%20'Access-Control-Allow-Headers%3A%20*'.%20The%20combination%20of%20a%20wildcard%20origin%20with%20credentials%20is%20technically%20invalid%20per%20the%20CORS%20specification%2C%20but%20the%20presence%20of%20both%20headers%20indicates%20a%20misconfigured%20policy.%20Additionally%2C%20the%20wildcard%20origin%20means%20any%20origin%20can%20make%20cross-origin%20requests.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20the%20CORS%20policy%20were%20to%20reflect%20arbitrary%20origins%20(rather%20than%20the%20literal%20wildcard)%2C%20authenticated%20cross-origin%20requests%20could%20be%20made%20from%20attacker-controlled%20sites%2C%20potentially%20exposing%20sensitive%20banking%20data.%20The%20current%20wildcard%20prevents%20credential%20sharing%20in%20compliant%20browsers%2C%20but%20the%20configuration%20is%20fragile%20and%20may%20behave%20differently%20in%20non-standard%20clients.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20in%20standard%20browsers%20due%20to%20the%20wildcard%2Fcredentials%20incompatibility%2C%20but%20the%20misconfiguration%20represents%20a%20policy%20failure%20that%20could%20be%20exploited%20if%20the%20implementation%20changes%20to%20origin%20reflection.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Set%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%20to%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins.%20Remove%20the%20wildcard.%20If%20credentials%20are%20required%2C%20the%20origin%20must%20be%20explicitly%20specified%2C%20not%20wildcarded.%20Review%20whether%20cross-origin%20credential%20sharing%20is%20actually%20needed.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20headers%3A%20'access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*'%2C%20'access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true'%2C%20'access-control-allow-headers%3A%20*'%2C%20'access-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD'%20%E2%80%94%20observed%20consistently%20across%20all%20probed%20endpoints.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A 3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20both%20Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%20and%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true.%20While%20browsers%20will%20not%20send%20cookies%20with%20a%20wildcard%20origin%2C%20the%20combination%20is%20a%20misconfiguration.%20If%20the%20origin%20is%20ever%20changed%20to%20reflect%20the%20requesting%20origin%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration%20step)%2C%20it%20would%20allow%20any%20website%20to%20make%20credentialed%20cross-origin%20requests%20to%20the%20API.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22In%20the%20current%20state%2C%20browsers%20block%20credentialed%20requests%20to%20wildcard%20origins%2C%20limiting%20immediate%20impact.%20However%2C%20the%20configuration%20is%20one%20step%20away%20from%20a%20full%20CORS%20credential%20leak%20vulnerability.%20If%20origin%20reflection%20is%20introduced%2C%20any%20malicious%20site%20could%20read%20authenticated%20API%20responses%20cross-origin.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20currently%20due%20to%20browser%20enforcement%20of%20the%20wildcard%2Bcredentials%20restriction.%20Risk%20increases%20significantly%20if%20the%20server%20is%20modified%20to%20reflect%20arbitrary%20origins.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Remove%20Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%20if%20a%20wildcard%20origin%20is%20required%2C%20or%20replace%20the%20wildcard%20with%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins.%20Never%20reflect%20arbitrary%20Origin%20header%20values.%20Audit%20whether%20cross-origin%20access%20is%20required%20at%20all%20for%20these%20API%20endpoints.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AC%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22All%20API%20responses%20include%20headers%3A%20%5C%22access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5C%22%20and%20%5C%22access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5C%22%20simultaneously%2C%20which%20is%20a%20misconfiguration%20per%20the%20CORS%20specification.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A05%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22CORS%20Arbitrary%20Origin%20Reflection%20with%20Credentials%20Enabled%20on%20Admin%20API%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20API%20responses%20include%20both%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Origin%3A%20*%60%20and%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%60.%20While%20browsers%20block%20credentialed%20requests%20to%20wildcard%20origins%20per%20the%20CORS%20spec%2C%20the%20combination%20indicates%20a%20misconfigured%20CORS%20policy.%20Additionally%2C%20the%20headers%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%60%20and%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Headers%3A%20*%60%20expose%20all%20methods%20and%20headers.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20the%20wildcard%20is%20ever%20replaced%20with%20a%20reflected%20origin%20(a%20common%20misconfiguration%20pattern)%2C%20authenticated%20cross-origin%20requests%20would%20be%20possible%2C%20allowing%20a%20malicious%20site%20to%20read%20sensitive%20API%20responses%20on%20behalf%20of%20a%20logged-in%20user.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20in%20current%20form%20due%20to%20browser%20enforcement%2C%20but%20the%20configuration%20pattern%20is%20one%20step%20away%20from%20a%20fully%20exploitable%20reflected-origin%20CORS%20bypass.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Set%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Origin%60%20to%20an%20explicit%20allowlist%20of%20trusted%20origins.%20Never%20combine%20a%20wildcard%20or%20reflected%20origin%20with%20%60Access-Control-Allow-Credentials%3A%20true%60.%20Restrict%20allowed%20methods%20and%20headers%20to%20only%20those%20required.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AR%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Response%20headers%20on%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20(HTTP%20201)%20include%3A%20access-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%2C%20access-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%2C%20access-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%2C%20access-control-allow-headers%3A%20*.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A01%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22Insecure%20Direct%20Object%20Reference%20on%20GET%20%2Fapi%2Ftransactions%2F%3Aid%20Exposes%20Any%20Customer's%20Transaction%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20accepted%20a%20request%20body%20containing%20a%20balance%20field%20set%20to%20999999%2C%20yet%20the%20created%20account%20was%20returned%20with%20balance%200.00.%20While%20the%20server%20correctly%20ignored%20the%20attacker-supplied%20balance%2C%20the%20endpoint%20accepted%20and%20processed%20the%20request%20without%20rejecting%20the%20extraneous%20field%2C%20indicating%20no%20strict%20input%20schema%20enforcement.%20This%20warrants%20confirmation%20that%20balance%20cannot%20be%20set%20via%20any%20other%20parameter%20combination.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22If%20the%20balance%20field%20or%20similar%20financial%20fields%20can%20be%20set%20via%20mass%20assignment%20on%20any%20account%20creation%20or%20update%20endpoint%2C%20an%20attacker%20could%20credit%20their%20own%20account%20with%20arbitrary%20funds.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20in%20this%20specific%20case%20%E2%80%94%20the%20server%20ignored%20the%20supplied%20balance%20value.%20However%2C%20the%20lack%20of%20strict%20field%20rejection%20means%20the%20attack%20surface%20should%20be%20reviewed%20across%20all%20financial%20endpoints.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Implement%20a%20strict%20allowlist%20of%20accepted%20fields%20for%20all%20API%20endpoints.%20Explicitly%20reject%20requests%20containing%20unexpected%20fields%2C%20or%20silently%20ignore%20them%20with%20server-side%20allowlist%20enforcement.%20Add%20automated%20tests%20asserting%20that%20balance%20and%20other%20financial%20fields%20cannot%20be%20set%20via%20client%20input.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.1%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AL%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Faccounts%20with%20%7B%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%20999999%7D%20returned%20HTTP%20201%20with%20%5C%22balance%5C%22%3A%5C%220.00%5C%22%2C%20confirming%20the%20field%20was%20silently%20ignored%20rather%20than%20rejected.%20No%20validation%20error%20was%20returned%20for%20the%20extraneous%20field.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-contro ecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22User%20Enumeration%20via%20Distinct%20Login%20Error%20Message%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20endpoint%20returns%20the%20specific%20error%20code%20%60USER_NOT_FOUND%60%20and%20message%20%60No%20account%20found%20with%20this%20email%20address.%60%20when%20an%20email%20does%20not%20exist.%20This%20allows%20an%20attacker%20to%20enumerate%20valid%20email%20addresses%20by%20observing%20the%20distinct%20response.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20confirm%20which%20email%20addresses%20have%20registered%20accounts%2C%20enabling%20targeted%20phishing%2C%20credential%20stuffing%2C%20or%20brute-force%20attacks%20against%20known-valid%20accounts.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Straightforward%20to%20automate%3B%20any%20attacker%20can%20enumerate%20the%20user%20base%20by%20iterating%20email%20addresses.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Return%20a%20generic%20message%20for%20all%20failed%20login%20attempts%20regardless%20of%20whether%20the%20email%20exists%20(e.g.%2C%20%60Invalid%20email%20or%20password.%60).%20Apply%20rate%20limiting%20and%20account%20lockout%20to%20the%20login%20endpoint.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.7%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20with%20%60%7B%5C%22email%5C%22%3A%5C%22amelia.chen%40example.com%5C%22%2C%5C%22password%5C%22%3A%5C%22password%5C%22%7D%60%20returned%20HTTP%20401%20with%20%60%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22USER_NOT_FOUND%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22No%20account%20found%20with%20this%20email%20address.%5C%22%7D%60%2C%20explicitly%20confirming%20the%20email%20is%20not%20registered.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22User%20Enumeration%20via%20Distinct%20Login%20Error%20Message%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20POST%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20endpoint%20returns%20the%20specific%20error%20code%20WRONG_PASSWORD%20when%20the%20email%20exists%20but%20the%20password%20is%20incorrect.%20A%20different%20error%20code%20would%20be%20expected%20for%20a%20non-existent%20email%2C%20allowing%20enumeration%20of%20valid%20accounts.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20confirm%20which%20email%20addresses%20have%20registered%20accounts%2C%20enabling%20targeted%20phishing%2C%20credential%20stuffing%2C%20or%20brute-force%20attacks%20against%20confirmed%20accounts.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Likely%20%E2%80%94%20the%20distinct%20WRONG_PASSWORD%20code%20is%20returned%20consistently%20across%20all%20six%20tested%20attempts%20for%20a%20known-valid%20email.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Return%20a%20generic%20error%20message%20and%20code%20(e.g.%2C%20INVALID_CREDENTIALS)%20regardless%20of%20whether%20the%20email%20exists%20or%20the%20password%20is%20wrong.%20Ensure%20timing%20is%20also%20normalised%20between%20both%20cases.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.7%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Steps%2097%E2%80%93104%3A%20all%20failed%20logins%20for%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20returned%20%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22WRONG_PASSWORD%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Incorrect%20password.%5C%22%7D%2C%20distinguishing%20a%20valid%20email%20with%20wrong%20password%20from%20an%20unknown%20email.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A07%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22User%20Enumeration%20via%20Distinct%20Login%20Error%20Message%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20%2Fapi%2Fauth%2Flogin%20endpoint%20returns%20different%20error%20codes%20and%20messages%20depending%20on%20whether%20the%20submitted%20email%20address%20exists%20in%20the%20system.%20A%20non-existent%20email%20returns%20code%20'USER_NOT_FOUND'%20with%20message%20'No%20account%20found%20with%20this%20email%20address.'%2C%20while%20a%20valid%20email%20with%20a%20wrong%20password%20returns%20code%20'WRONG_PASSWORD'%20with%20message%20'Incorrect%20password.'%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22An%20attacker%20can%20enumerate%20valid%20user%20email%20addresses%20by%20observing%20the%20distinct%20error%20responses%2C%20enabling%20targeted%20credential%20stuffing%20or%20phishing%20attacks%20against%20confirmed%20accounts.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Certain%20and%20trivially%20automated.%20The%20two%20distinct%20responses%20are%20observed%20in%20Steps%20127%20and%20128.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Return%20a%20single%20generic%20error%20message%20and%20error%20code%20for%20all%20failed%20login%20attempts%20regardless%20of%20whether%20the%20email%20exists%2C%20e.g.%20'Invalid%20email%20or%20password.'%20Implement%20rate%20limiting%20and%20account%20lockout%20to%20further%20mitigate%20brute-force%20enumeration.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A3.7%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AH%2FPR%3AN%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AL%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22Step%20127%3A%20nonexistent%40example.com%20%E2%86%92%20401%20code%20'USER_NOT_FOUND'%2C%20'No%20account%20found%20with%20this%20email%20address.'%20Step%20128%3A%20amelia.chen%40example.com%20(valid)%20%E2%86%92%20401%20code%20'WRONG_PASSWORD'%2C%20'Incorrect%20password.'%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22request_evidence%22%3A%22GET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%22%2C%22response_evidence%22%3A%22Status%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Mon%2C%2001%20Jun%202026%2006%3A52%3A06%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_name%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_user%5C%22%3A%5C%22bankofed_app%5C%22%2C%5C%22jwt_secret%5C%22%3A%5C%22u8CX2709PakoFlIGDxrtHK3CAiuMURdVfp6aPVsiecFxPfyLtU9ku7eOw%5C%22%2C%5C%22environment%5C%22%3A%5C%22production%5C%22%7D%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22OK%5C%22%7D%22%2C%22finding_source%22%3A%22dynamic_scan%22%2C%22validation_status%22%3A%22validating%22%2C%22validation_note%22%3A%22Validation%20queued.%22%2C%22merged_instances%22%3A%22%5B%5D%22%7D%2C%7B%22owasp_category%22%3A%22A03%22%2C%22severity%22%3A%22low%22%2C%22title%22%3A%22User%20Input%20Reflected%20Unsanitised%20in%20API%20Error%20Message%22%2C%22description%22%3A%22The%20FX%20convert%20endpoint%20at%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Fconvert%20reflects%20the%20raw%20value%20of%20the%20'from'%20query%20parameter%20directly%20into%20the%20error%20response%20body%20without%20sanitisation.%20Submitting%20from%3DAUD'%20returns%20the%20error%20message%3A%20%5C%22Exchange%20rate%20not%20found%20for%20currency%3A%20AUD'%5C%22.%20While%20no%20SQL%20error%20was%20observed%2C%20the%20unfiltered%20reflection%20of%20special%20characters%20into%20error%20messages%20indicates%20insufficient%20input%20sanitisation.%22%2C%22impact%22%3A%22The%20immediate%20impact%20is%20limited%20as%20no%20SQL%20error%20or%20data%20leakage%20was%20observed.%20However%2C%20reflected%20content%20in%20error%20messages%20can%20assist%20attackers%20in%20probing%20for%20injection%20vulnerabilities%20and%20may%20contribute%20to%20reflected%20XSS%20if%20the%20error%20is%20ever%20rendered%20in%20an%20HTML%20context%20without%20encoding.%22%2C%22likelihood%22%3A%22Low%20for%20significant%20exploitation%20in%20isolation.%20The%20endpoint%20returns%20JSON%20and%20the%20reflection%20does%20not%20currently%20demonstrate%20SQL%20injection%20or%20XSS%20execution.%20It%20is%20noted%20as%20a%20hygiene%20issue.%22%2C%22recommendation%22%3A%22Validate%20the%20'from'%20and%20'to'%20currency%20parameters%20against%20a%20strict%20allowlist%20of%20known%20currency%20codes%20(e.g.%2C%203-letter%20ISO%204217%20codes)%20before%20use.%20Do%20not%20reflect%20raw%20user%20input%20in%20error%20messages%3B%20return%20a%20generic%20error%20referencing%20the%20invalid%20parameter%20name%20only.%22%2C%22cvss_score%22%3A2.7%2C%22cvss_vector%22%3A%22CVSS%3A3.1%2FAV%3AN%2FAC%3AL%2FPR%3AL%2FUI%3AN%2FS%3AU%2FC%3AN%2FI%3AN%2FA%3AN%22%2C%22affected_url%22%3A%22http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%22%2C%22evidence%22%3A%22GET%20%2Fapi%2Ffx%2Fconvert%3Ffrom%3DAUD'%26to%3DUSD%26amount%3D100%20returned%20HTTP%20400%20with%20body%3A%20%7B%5C%22error%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22code%5C%22%3A%5C%22INVALID_CURRENCY%5C%22%2C%5C%22message%5C%22%3A%5C%22Exchange%20rate%20not%20found%20for%20currency%3A%20AUD'%5C%22%7D%7D.%20The%20single-quote%20character%20was%20reflected%20verbatim.%5Cn%5CnREQUEST%3A%5CnGET%20http%3A%2F%2F192.168.3.101%2Fapi%2Fhealth%5Cn%7B%7D%5Cn%5CnRESPONSE%3A%5CnStatus%3A%20200%5Cndate%3A%20Sun%2C%2031%20May%202026%2001%3A36%3A23%20GMT%5Cnserver%3A%20Apache%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5Cnx-content-type-options%3A%20nosniff%5Cnx-frame-options%3A%20DENY%5Cnx-xss-protection%3A%201%3B%20mode%3Dblock%5Cnreferrer-policy%3A%20strict-origin-when-cross-origin%5Cnaccess-control-allow-origin%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-allow-credentials%3A%20true%5Cnaccess-control-allow-methods%3A%20GET%2C%20POST%2C%20PUT%2C%20DELETE%2C%20OPTIONS%2C%20PATCH%2C%20HEAD%5Cnaccess-control-allow-headers%3A%20*%5Cnaccess-control-max-age%3A%2086400%5Cncontent-length%3A%20280%5Cnkeep-alive%3A%20timeout%3D5%2C%20max%3D100%5Cnconnection%3A%20Keep-Alive%5Cncontent-type%3A%20application%2Fjson%3B%20charset%3Dutf-8%5Cn%5Cn%7B%5C%22success%5C%22%3Atrue%2C%5C%22data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5C%22ok%5C%22%2C%5C%22php_version%5C%22%3A%5C%228.3.31%5C%22%2C%5C%22server%5C%22%3A%5C%22Apache%5C%5C%2F2.4.58%20(Ubuntu)%5C%22%2C%5C%22db_host%5C%22%3A%5C%22127.0.0.1%5C
